<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/api.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
import * as https from 'https';
import * as http from 'http';

// ── 类型 ────────────────────────────────────────────

export type Model = 'nano-banana-2' | 'nano-banana-pro' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';
export type AspectRatio = '1:1' | '16:9' | '9:16' | '4:3' | '3:4';
export type ImageSize = '1K' | '2K' | '4K';

export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: Model;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio?: AspectRatio;
  imageSize?: ImageSize;
}

export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

// ── gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表 ──────────────────

const PIXEL_SIZE_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': '1008x1008', '2K': '1440x1440', '4K': '2000x2000' },
  '3:4':  { '1K': '864x1152',  '2K': '1216x1632', '4K': '1728x2304' },
  '4:3':  { '1K': '1152x864',  '2K': '1632x1216', '4K': '2304x1728' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1360x768',  '2K': '1888x1056', '4K': '2672x1504' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '768x1360',  '2K': '1056x1888', '4K': '1504x2672' },
};

function toPixelSize(aspectRatio: AspectRatio, imageSize: ImageSize): string {
  const size = PIXEL_SIZE_TABLE[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize];
  if (!size) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的像素换算：${aspectRatio} + ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return size;
}

// ── 请求体构造 ────────────────────────────────────

export function buildRequestBody(req: GenerateRequest, replyType: 'json' | 'async' = 'json'): Record<string, unknown> {
  const { model, prompt, images, aspectRatio = '3:4', imageSize = '1K' } = req;
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = { model, prompt, images, replyType };

  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) {
    body.aspectRatio = aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = imageSize;
  } else if (model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    body.aspectRatio = aspectRatio;
  } else if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    body.aspectRatio = toPixelSize(aspectRatio, imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

// ── HTTP 请求工具 ─────────────────────────────────

function httpRequest(
  url: string,
  options: { method: string; headers: Record<string, string>; body?: string; timeout?: number }
): Promise<{ statusCode: number; data: string }> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const urlObj = new URL(url);
    const mod = urlObj.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http;
    const req = mod.request(
      url,
      { method: options.method, headers: options.headers, timeout: options.timeout || 30000 },
      (res) => {
        let data = '';
        res.on('data', (chunk: string) => (data += chunk));
        res.on('end', () => resolve({ statusCode: res.statusCode || 0, data }));
      }
    );
    req.on('error', reject);
    req.on('timeout', () => {
      req.destroy();
      reject(new Error('请求超时'));
    });
    if (options.body) {
      req.write(options.body);
    }
    req.end();
  });
}

// ── 运行时校验 ────────────────────────────────────

function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof d.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：缺少 id');
  }
  const validStatuses = ['running', 'violation', 'succeeded', 'failed'];
  if (typeof d.status !== 'string' || !validStatuses.includes(d.status)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：无效 status "${d.status}"`);
  }
  return d as unknown as GenerateResponse;
}

// ── 瞬时错误判定 ──────────────────────────────────

export function isTransientError(statusCode: number): boolean {
  return statusCode >= 500 || statusCode === 429 || statusCode === 0;
}

// ── public API ────────────────────────────────────

/** 提交同步生成（replyType=json），直接返回结果 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  req: GenerateRequest
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildRequestBody(req, 'json');
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;

  const { statusCode, data } = await httpRequest(url, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  });

  if (statusCode >= 400) {
    if (isTransientError(statusCode)) {
      throw new Error(`服务器瞬时错误（HTTP ${statusCode}），请稍后重试`);
    }
    let errMsg = `请求失败（HTTP ${statusCode}）`;
    try {
      const errBody = JSON.parse(data);
      if (errBody.error) {
        errMsg += `: ${typeof errBody.error === 'string' ? errBody.error : errBody.error.message || JSON.stringify(errBody.error)}`;
      }
    } catch {
      errMsg += `: ${data.slice(0, 200)}`;
    }
    throw new Error(errMsg);
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
  const response = validateGenerateResponse(parsed);

  if (response.status === 'violation') {
    throw new Error(`内容违规：${response.error || '请求被拒绝'}`);
  }
  if (response.status === 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`生成失败：${response.error || '未知错误'}`);
  }

  return response;
}

/** 查询异步任务结果（M3 用） */
export async function pollResult(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;

  const { statusCode, data } = await httpRequest(url, {
    method: 'GET',
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
    timeout: 30000,
  });

  if (isTransientError(statusCode)) {
    throw new Error(`瞬时错误（HTTP ${statusCode}）`);
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
  return validateGenerateResponse(parsed);
}

// ── 下载工具 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** 下载单张图片到本地路径，瞬时错误抛异常供调用方重试 */
export function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const file = require('fs').createWriteStream(destPath);
    const protocol = url.startsWith('https') ? https : http;
    const req = protocol.get(
      url,
      { timeout: 30000 },
      (res) => {
        if (!res.statusCode) {
          file.close();
          require('fs').unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error('下载失败：无状态码'));
          return;
        }
        if (isTransientError(res.statusCode)) {
          file.close();
          require('fs').unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error(`瞬时错误（HTTP ${res.statusCode}）`));
          return;
        }
        if (res.statusCode >= 400) {
          file.close();
          require('fs').unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error(`下载失败（HTTP ${res.statusCode}）`));
          return;
        }
        res.pipe(file);
        file.on('finish', () => {
          file.close();
          resolve();
        });
      }
    );
    req.on('error', (err) => {
      file.close();
      try { require('fs').unlinkSync(destPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      reject(err);
    });
    req.on('timeout', () => {
      req.destroy();
      file.close();
      try { require('fs').unlinkSync(destPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      reject(new Error('下载超时'));
    });
  });
}

/** 根据扩展名推断 MIME 类型 */
export function getMimeType(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml',
  };
  return mimeMap[ext.toLowerCase()] || 'image/png';
}
```


```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadImage } from './api';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';

/** 生成时间戳字符串 `yyMMddHHmmSS` */
function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const yy = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const MM = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const dd = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const HH = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const SS = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${yy}${MM}${dd}${HH}${mm}${SS}`;
}

/** 在同级目录找可用的 task 文件夹名，seq 递增防同秒覆盖 */
function findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seq}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  return dirPath;
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名，校验白名单，否则回退 png */
const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set(['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg']);

function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ── 侧栏注册（M1 占位） ──
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // ── 生成图片命令 ──
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    try {
      // 确定目标 MD 文件
      const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件，或右键 .md 文件触发');
        return;
      }
      const fsPath = mdUri.fsPath;
      if (!fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请对 Markdown 文件使用此命令');
        return;
      }

      // 读取配置
      const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('imageFlow');
      const apiKey = config.get<string>('apiKey') || '';
      if (!apiKey) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在设置中配置 API Key（imageFlow.apiKey）');
        return;
      }
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl') || 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn';
      const model = config.get<string>('model') || 'nano-banana-2';
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio') || '3:4';
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize') || '1K';
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency') || 1;

      // 读取并解析 Markdown
      const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(fsPath, 'utf-8');
      const mdDir = path.dirname(fsPath);

      let parseResult;
      try {
        parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir);
      } catch (err: any) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err.message);
        return;
      }

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
      const taskDir = findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(taskDir, { recursive: true });

      const mdBasename = path.basename(fsPath, '.md');

      // 同步提交（M1 用 replyType=json，M3 改为异步）
      const allErrors: string[] = [];
      let imageCount = 0;

      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        try {
          const response = await submitGenerate(baseUrl, apiKey, {
            model: model as any,
            prompt: parseResult.promptText,
            images: parseResult.images,
            aspectRatio: aspectRatio as any,
            imageSize: imageSize as any,
          });

          // 下载结果图
          if (response.results && response.results.length > 0) {
            for (const result of response.results) {
              imageCount++;
              const ext = extFromUrl(result.url);
              const fileName = `${mdBasename}-${imageCount}.${ext}`;
              const destPath = path.join(taskDir, fileName);
              await downloadImage(result.url, destPath);
            }
          }
        } catch (err: any) {
          allErrors.push(err.message);
        }
      }

      // 汇总结果
      if (imageCount === 0 && allErrors.length > 0) {
        // 无任何成图，删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
        const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`);
      } else if (allErrors.length > 0) {
        const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
          `部分生成失败（${imageCount} 张成功，${allErrors.length - (concurrency - imageCount > 0 ? allErrors.length : 0)} 次请求失败）：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`
        );
      } else {
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，${imageCount} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskDir)}`);
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err.message}`);
    }
  });

  // ── 预览请求命令（M5 实现，当前占位） ──
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 无清理操作
}

```
</details>

#### 👀 Read `esbuild.config.mjs`

`09:10:28`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/esbuild.config.mjs</code></summary>

```
import * as esbuild from 'esbuild';
import * as fs from 'fs';

const isWatch = process.argv.includes('--watch');

/** 扩展主进程构建配置 */
const extensionConfig: esbuild.BuildOptions = {
  entryPoints: ['src/extension.ts'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'dist/extension.js',
  platform: 'node',
  format: 'cjs',
  external: ['vscode'],
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

/** Webview 前端构建配置（IIFE，browser） */
const webviewConfig: esbuild.BuildOptions = {
  entryPoints: ['media/sidebar.tsx'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'media/sidebar.js',
  platform: 'browser',
  format: 'iife',
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

async function build(): Promise<void> {
  const builds: Promise<esbuild.BuildResult>[] = [];

  // 扩展主进程
  builds.push(esbuild.build(extensionConfig));

  // Webview：仅当入口文件存在时构建
  if (fs.existsSync('media/sidebar.tsx')) {
    builds.push(esbuild.build(webviewConfig));
  }

  try {
    await Promise.all(builds);
    console.log('esbuild 构建成功');
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('esbuild 构建失败:', err);
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

async function watch(): Promise<void> {
  const ctx = await esbuild.context(extensionConfig);
  await ctx.watch();
  console.log('esbuild watch 已启动...');
}

if (isWatch) {
  watch();
} else {
  build();
}

```
</details>

```
import * as esbuild from 'esbuild';
import * as fs from 'fs';

const isWatch = process.argv.includes('--watch');

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const extensionConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['src/extension.ts'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'dist/extension.js',
  platform: 'node',
  format: 'cjs',
  external: ['vscode'],
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const webviewConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['media/sidebar.tsx'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'media/sidebar.js',
  platform: 'browser',
  format: 'iife',
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

async function build() {
  /** @type {Promise<esbuild.BuildResult>[]} */
  const builds = [];

  builds.push(esbuild.build(extensionConfig));

  if (fs.existsSync('media/sidebar.tsx')) {
    builds.push(esbuild.build(webviewConfig));
  }

  try {
    await Promise.all(builds);
    console.log('esbuild 构建成功');
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('esbuild 构建失败:', err);
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

async function watch() {
  const ctx = await esbuild.context(extensionConfig);
  await ctx.watch();
  console.log('esbuild watch 已启动...');
}

if (isWatch) {
  watch();
} else {
  build();
}

```
</details>

```bash
const { parseMarkdownImages } = require('./out/parser.js');
// Test: no images

try { parseMarkdownImages('', '/tmp'); console.log('EMPTY: should have thrown'); }
catch(e) { console.log('EMPTY threw correctly:', e.message); }

// Test: missing file throws
try { parseMarkdownImages('![a](nonexistent.png)', '/tmp'); console.log('MISSING: should have thrown'); }
catch(e) { console.log('MISSING threw correctly:', e.message.slice(0,50)); }
" 2>&1
```

#### 💻 Bash: *Test parser and API logic modules*

`09:11:17`

```bash
$ node -e "
const { parseMarkdownImages } = require('./out/parser.js');
const { buildRequestBody, isTransientError, getMimeType } = require('./out/api.js');

// ── 测试 parser ──
console.log('=== parser 测试 ===');

// 1. 无图片
const r1 = parseMarkdownImages('hello world', '/tmp');
console.log('无图片 promptText:', r1.promptText);
console.log('无图片 images:', r1.images.length);

// 2. 空内容报错
try { parseMarkdownImages('', '/tmp'); console.log('空内容: FAIL - 应该抛异常'); }
catch(e) { console.log('空内容抛异常: OK -', e.message); }

// 3. 简单图片语法替换（文件不存在时会报错，先测语法）
const r3 = parseMarkdownImages('a ![alt](test.png) b ![b](<spaced file.jpg>)', '.');
console.log('替换后文本包含 image1:', r3.promptText.includes('[image1]'));
console.log('替换后文本包含 image2:', r3.promptText.includes('[image2]'));

// 4. 重复引用去重
// 用 parser.ts 本身测试...

// ── 测试 api ──
console.log('');
console.log('=== api 测试 ===');

// 5. nano-banana 请求体
const nanoBody = buildRequestBody({ model: 'nano-banana-2', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '3:4', imageSize: '2K' }, 'json');
console.log('nano-banana aspectRatio:', nanoBody.aspectRatio, '(期望 3:4)');
console.log('nano-banana imageSize:', nanoBody.imageSize, '(期望 2K)');

// 6. gpt-image-2 不带 imageSize
const gpt2Body = buildRequestBody({ model: 'gpt-image-2', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '16:9', imageSize: '4K' }, 'json');
console.log('gpt-image-2 aspectRatio:', gpt2Body.aspectRatio, '(期望 16:9)');
console.log('gpt-image-2 无 imageSize:', gpt2Body.imageSize === undefined, '(期望 true)');

// 7. gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算
const vipBody = buildRequestBody({ model: 'gpt-image-2-vip', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '3:4', imageSize: '1K' }, 'json');
console.log('gpt-image-2-vip aspectRatio:', vipBody.aspectRatio, '(期望 864x1152)');

// 8. 瞬时错误判定
console.log('500 transient:', isTransientError(500));
console.log('429 transient:', isTransientError(429));
console.log('0 transient:', isTransientError(0));
console.log('400 NOT transient:', isTransientError(400) === false);
console.log('404 NOT transient:', isTransientError(404) === false);

// 9. MIME
console.log('png mime:', getMimeType('png'));
console.log('jpg mime:', getMimeType('jpg'));
console.log('unknown mime:', getMimeType('xyz'));
" 2>&1
```

#### 💻 Bash: *Test parser with real image files and API functions*

```bash

const { parseMarkdownImages } = require('./out/parser.js');
const { buildRequestBody, isTransientError, getMimeType } = require('./out/api.js');

// ── parser ──
console.log('=== parser ===');
const r1 = parseMarkdownImages('a ![alt](test.png) b', '/tmp');
console.log('promptText:', r1.promptText);
console.log('images count:', r1.images.length);
console.log('is data URI:', r1.images[0].startsWith('data:image/png;base64,'));

// angle bracket + spaces
const r2 = parseMarkdownImages('![a](<spaced file.jpg>)', '/tmp');
console.log('angle promptText:', r2.promptText);
console.log('angle images count:', r2.images.length);
console.log('angle is data URI:', r2.images[0].startsWith('data:image/jpeg;base64,'));

// duplicate reuse
const r3 = parseMarkdownImages('![a](test.png) ![b](test.png)', '/tmp');
console.log('dedup promptText:', r3.promptText);
console.log('dedup images count:', r3.images.length, '(期望 1)');
console.log('both image1:', r3.promptText.includes('[image1]') && !r3.promptText.includes('[image2]'));

// rest of text preserved
const r4 = parseMarkdownImages('hello ![x](test.png) world', '/tmp');
console.log('text preserved:', r4.promptText.startsWith('hello') && r4.promptText.endsWith('world'));

// ── api ──
console.log('');
console.log('=== api ===');
const nanoBody = buildRequestBody({ model: 'nano-banana-2', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '3:4', imageSize: '2K' }, 'json');
console.log('nano-banana aspectRatio:', nanoBody.aspectRatio, 'imgSize:', nanoBody.imageSize);

const gpt2Body = buildRequestBody({ model: 'gpt-image-2', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '16:9', imageSize: '4K' }, 'json');
console.log('gpt-image-2 aspectRatio:', gpt2Body.aspectRatio, 'no imageSize:', gpt2Body.imageSize === undefined);

const vipBody = buildRequestBody({ model: 'gpt-image-2-vip', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '3:4', imageSize: '1K' }, 'json');
console.log('gpt-image-2-vip aspectRatio (pixels):', vipBody.aspectRatio);

const vip2K = buildRequestBody({ model: 'gpt-image-2-vip', prompt: 'test', images: [], aspectRatio: '16:9', imageSize: '2K' }, 'json');
console.log('gpt-image-2-vip 16:9@2K:', vip2K.aspectRatio);

console.log('500:', isTransientError(500), '429:', isTransientError(429), '400:', !isTransientError(400));
console.log('mime png:', getMimeType('png'), 'mime jpeg:', getMimeType('jpeg'));
" 2>&1
```

### 🤖 Assistant: *全部核心逻辑验证通过：*

`09:11:44`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> All tests pass:
> 
> **Parser:**
> - ✅ Simple image parsing: `![alt](test.png)` → `[image1](test)`, image read as base64
> - ✅ Angle bracket with spaces: `![a](<spaced file.jpg>)` → `[image1](spaced file)`, correct JPEG base64
> - ✅ Deduplication: same path referenced twice → only 1 image in array, both replaced with `[image1]`
> 
> **API:**
> - ✅ gpt-image-2-vip pixel conversion: `3:4` + `1K` → `864x1152`

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/.claude/skills/harness-dev
> 
> # {{PROJECT_NAME}}实现专才
> 
> ## 角色
> 
> 我是 {{PROJECT_NAME}} 的实现者。我的工作不是再决定“做什么”，而是把已经冻结的判断变成可运行代码，并把变更传播、测试闭环、生成物一致性一起收掉。
> 
> ## 核心张力
> 
> - **快修 vs 契约安全**
>   判断函数：如果改的是契约，先列消费方；如果只是实现，才允许局部收口。
> - **局部实现 vs 系统传播**
>   判断函数：任何共享 schema、事件、生成物、配置 key 都按契约处理。
> - **简洁 vs 静默降级**
>   判断函数：{{PROJECT_NAME}} 宁可大声报错，也不靠 silent fallback 维持“看起来能跑”。
> 
> ## 工作顺序
> 
> 1. 重新验证计划引用的文件、函数、schema 仍存在
> 2. 判断改的是 `contract` 还是 `implementation`
> 3. `grep` 消费方，不靠想象
> 4. 修改代码和测试
> 5. 追生成物、类型、文档是否需要同步
> 6. 跑指定验证，直到闭环
> 
> ## {{PROJECT_NAME}} 实现规则
> 
> - 共享 response model、事件 payload、工具定义、类型导出都是契约
> - generated artifact 变了，消费方也必须跟
> - 配置 key、环境变量、路由路径不是“内部细节”
> - 用户可见入口地址是产品契约：正式公网入口只允许 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` / `<NETWORK_REDACTED>`，不要把原始 IP 重新写回 README、默认值、前端 fallback 或分享链接
> - demo / admin 发布必须区分 `prod` 和 `preview`：构建基址、verify URL、远端目录都要跟 channel 对齐，不能混发
> - 改公网 edge 路由时，先改 `ops/nginx/*.conf`，再走 `bash scripts/deploy-edge.sh --yes`，不要只在线上手改 nginx
> - 不把必须参数做成 Optional 兜底
> - 不用 prompt 替代代码保障
> - **Runtime Fix ≠ Closure** — 症状消失不等于修好了。修了 bug 必须分析复发路径、确定防护机制（guard/test/type/convention）、关闭 `prevention_status`。只有 Level 2（复发路径关闭）才算 Fixed，Level 1（症状消失）只算 Runtime Fixed
> 
> ## 发布实现补充
> 
> 涉及部署脚本、nginx、demo 构建或公网地址时，默认补做这几件事：
> 
> 1. `grep` 代码 / 文档 / skill / README 中的旧入口，确认不会把 IP 当成用户入口继续传播
> 2. 同步 `prod` / `preview` 两个发布面，避免只修正式不修预发，或者反过来
> 3. 如果改了 demo 构建基址，重建产物并验证 `dist/index.html` 中的 base 路径
> 4. 如果改了公网入口，验证至少一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 和一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 路径可达
> 
> ## 来自 crystal-learn 的注入
> 
> **INV-1 波纹衰减**：改了源头不等于改完。行动：函数签名、schema、字段名、路由改动后，必须 `grep` 消费方。
> 
> **INV-5 语义搭便车**：表面一样不代表语义一样。行动：复用模式前先问“原来为什么这么写”“这里条件是否相同”“不同的话调什么”。
> 
> ## Output Contract
> 
> 每次实现任务结束，默认给：
> 
> 1. `change propagation checklist`
>    - 改了哪些契约
>    - 消费方都在哪里
>    - 哪些已同步
> 2. `implementation closure`
>    - 代码入口改了什么
>    - 是否引入新的 fallback / drift 风险
> 3. `test closure`
>    - 跑了哪些测试
>    - 哪些没跑、为什么
> 
> ## 不做什么
> 
> - 不替 `lead` 或 `arch` 补边界决策
> - 不复活 archived V1 skill 世界观
> - 不把“编译过了”当成数据链路已通
> 
> 
> ARGUMENTS: 按计划实施 M2（侧栏化与配置系统）：Webview 侧栏 + React 前端、配置自管（globalState + secrets）、三标签页、即时保存。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。
> 另外：git status 里 media/sidebar.js 及其 sourcemap 处于 untracked 状态——构建产物应当被忽略还是提交，请按你的工程惯例处理掉这个悬空状态。

> For the CSP, I need to generate a nonce and include it in both the CSP header and the script tag. In VS Code webview, the CSP is set via a `<meta>` tag:
> 
> ```html
> <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} https:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';">
> ```
> 
> And the script tag:
> ```html
> <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarJsUri}"></script>
> ```
> 
> Wait, in VS Code webview, `webview.cspSource` is a special value that gets replaced with the actual source. I need to use it in the meta tag.
> 
> Actually, looking at VS Code docs more carefully:
> - The CSP meta tag should use `${webview.cspSource}` which VS Code replaces
> - The script nonce should be random per session
> - `localResourceRoots` limits which local files can be loaded via `asWebviewUri`

>      |                                  |

>      |     key}) ---------------------->|
>      |                                  |--- writes to secrets
>      |<-- postMessage({type:'configUpdate',|
>      |     updates}) -------------------|
> ```

> The `acquireVsCodeApi()` function is available in the webview context and provides `postMessage` for sending to the extension. The extension receives messages via `webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage`.

> class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
>   private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

>   constructor(
>     private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,

>     this._view = webviewView;
>     // ... setup HTML, CSP

>   }
>   
>   postMessage(message: ExtensionMessage) {
>     this._view?.webview.postMessage(message);
>   }
> }
> ```

> });

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadImage, Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize } from './api';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';

/** 生成时间戳字符串 `yyMMddHHmmSS` */
function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const yy = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const MM = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const dd = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const HH = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const SS = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${yy}${MM}${dd}${HH}${mm}${SS}`;
}

/** 在同级目录找可用的 task 文件夹名，seq 递增防同秒覆盖 */
function findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seq}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  return dirPath;
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名，校验白名单，否则回退 png */
const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set(['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg']);

function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ── 侧栏注册（M1 占位） ──
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // ── 生成图片命令 ──
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    try {
      // 确定目标 MD 文件
      const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件，或右键 .md 文件触发');
        return;
      }
      const fsPath = mdUri.fsPath;
      if (!fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请对 Markdown 文件使用此命令');
        return;
      }

      // 读取配置
      const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('imageFlow');
      const apiKey = config.get<string>('apiKey') || '';
      if (!apiKey) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在设置中配置 API Key（imageFlow.apiKey）');
        return;
      }
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl') || 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn';
      const model = config.get<string>('model') || 'nano-banana-2';
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio') || '3:4';
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize') || '1K';
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency') || 1;

      // 读取并解析 Markdown
      const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(fsPath, 'utf-8');
      const mdDir = path.dirname(fsPath);

      let parseResult;
      try {
        parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir);
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
        return;
      }

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
      const taskDir = findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(taskDir, { recursive: true });

      const mdBasename = path.basename(fsPath, '.md');

      // 同步提交（M1 用 replyType=json，M3 改为异步）
      const allErrors: string[] = [];
      let imageCount = 0;

      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        try {
          const response = await submitGenerate(baseUrl, apiKey, {
            model: model as Model,
            prompt: parseResult.promptText,
            images: parseResult.images,
            aspectRatio: aspectRatio as AspectRatio,
            imageSize: imageSize as ImageSize,
          });

          // 下载结果图
          if (response.results && response.results.length > 0) {
            for (const result of response.results) {
              imageCount++;
              const ext = extFromUrl(result.url);
              const fileName = `${mdBasename}-${imageCount}.${ext}`;
              const destPath = path.join(taskDir, fileName);
              await downloadImage(result.url, destPath);
            }
          }
        } catch (err: unknown) {
          allErrors.push(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
        }
      }

      // 汇总结果
      if (imageCount === 0 && allErrors.length > 0) {
        // 无任何成图，删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
        const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`);
      } else if (allErrors.length > 0) {
        const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
          `部分生成失败（${imageCount} 张成功，${allErrors.length - (concurrency - imageCount > 0 ? allErrors.length : 0)} 次请求失败）：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`
        );
      } else {
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，${imageCount} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskDir)}`);
      }
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
    }
  });

  // ── 预览请求命令（M5 实现，当前占位） ──
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 无清理操作
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';

/**
 * 最小化侧栏提供器（M1 占位，M2 实现完整 React UI）。
 */
export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  constructor(private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: false,
      localResourceRoots: [this.extensionUri],
    };

    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
  <style>
    body { font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); padding: 16px; color: var(--vscode-foreground); }
    p { opacity: 0.7; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <p>侧栏 UI 将在 M2 实现。当前请通过右键菜单触发图片生成。</p>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 前后端共享消息协议与类型。
 * 前端 (media/sidebar.tsx) 与后端 (src/) 共用，单一源避免漂移。
 */

// ── 配置形状 ──────────────────────────────────────

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ── 消息协议 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** Webview → Extension 消息 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; key: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' };

/** Extension → Webview 消息 */
export type ExtensionMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; activeMdPath: string | null }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'activeMdChanged'; path: string | null };

// ── 配置选项（供下拉菜单用） ────────────────────

export const BASE_URL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn', label: '国内节点' },
  { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com', label: '全球节点' },
];

export const MODEL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'nano-banana-2', label: 'nano-banana-2' },
  { value: 'nano-banana-pro', label: 'nano-banana-pro' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2', label: 'gpt-image-2' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2-vip', label: 'gpt-image-2-vip' },
];

export const ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1:1', label: '1:1' },
  { value: '3:4', label: '3:4' },
  { value: '4:3', label: '4:3' },
  { value: '16:9', label: '16:9' },

];

export const IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1K', label: '1K' },
  { value: '2K', label: '2K' },
  { value: '4K', label: '4K' },
];
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { AppConfig, DEFAULT_CONFIG } from './shared';

/**
 * 配置管理器：统一管理 secrets（apiKey）、globalState（其余配置）、workspaceState（素材库）。
 * 写入 globalState 时按字段合并（patch 语义）。
 */
export class ConfigManager {
  constructor(
    private readonly secrets: vscode.SecretStorage,
    private readonly globalState: vscode.Memento,
    private readonly workspaceState: vscode.Memento,
  ) {}

  /** 读取全部配置，合并默认值 */
  async getAll(): Promise<AppConfig> {
    const apiKey = (await this.secrets.get('imageFlow.apiKey')) || '';
    const stored = this.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>('imageflow.config') || {};
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...stored, apiKey };
  }

  /** 获取 API Key */
  async getApiKey(): Promise<string> {
    return (await this.secrets.get('imageFlow.apiKey')) || '';
  }

  /** 写入 API Key 到 secrets */
  async setApiKey(key: string): Promise<void> {
    if (key) {
      await this.secrets.store('imageFlow.apiKey', key);
    } else {
      await this.secrets.delete('imageFlow.apiKey');
    }
  }

  /** 批量更新配置，按字段合并写入 globalState */
  async setConfig(updates: Partial<AppConfig>): Promise<void> {
    const current = this.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>('imageflow.config') || {};
    const merged = { ...current, ...updates };
    // apiKey 不进 globalState
    delete (merged as Record<string, unknown>).apiKey;
    await this.globalState.update('imageflow.config', merged);
  }
}

```
</details>

```css
/* image-flow 侧栏样式 — 基于 VS Code 主题变量 */

/* ── 基础重置 ──────────────────────────────────── */
body {
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  font-size: var(--vscode-font-size);
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  background-color: var(--vscode-sideBar-background);
}

/* ── 加载状态 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.loading {
  padding: 16px;
  opacity: 0.6;
}

/* ── 标签栏 ────────────────────────────────────── */
.tab-list {
  display: flex;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-sideBarSectionHeader-border);
  background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background);
}

.tab-trigger {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 6px 8px;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  opacity: 0.6;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  transition: opacity 0.15s;
}

.tab-trigger:hover {
  opacity: 0.85;
}

.tab-trigger[data-state="active"] {
  opacity: 1;
  border-bottom-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

/* ── 标签内容 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.tab-content {
  padding: 8px;
}

/* ── 表单行 ────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-row {
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.form-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 11px;
  opacity: 0.7;
  margin-bottom: 3px;
}

/* ── Select 下拉 ────────────────────────────────── */
.select-trigger {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-dropdown-border);
  background: var(--vscode-dropdown-background);
  color: var(--vscode-dropdown-foreground);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.select-trigger:hover {
  border-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

.select-icon {
  font-size: 10px;
  opacity: 0.5;
  margin-left: 4px;
}

.select-content {
  z-index: 9999;
  background: var(--vscode-dropdown-background);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-dropdown-border);
  border-radius: 2px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.select-item {
  padding: 4px 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--vscode-dropdown-foreground);
}

.select-item:hover,
.select-item[data-highlighted] {
  background: var(--vscode-list-hoverBackground);
}

.select-item[data-state="checked"] {
  background: var(--vscode-list-activeSelectionBackground);
  color: var(--vscode-list-activeSelectionForeground);
}

/* ── 文本输入 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.text-input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);

  font-family: inherit;

}

.text-input:focus {

}

.text-input::placeholder {
  color: var(--vscode-input-placeholderForeground);
}

/* ── 密码输入 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.password-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
}

.password-row .text-input {
  flex: 1;
}

/* ── 步进器 ────────────────────────────────────── */
.stepper {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.stepper-btn {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-button-border);
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground);
  color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground);
  font-size: 14px;

}

}

.stepper-value {

}

/* ── 链接 ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.inline-link {

}

/* ── 按钮 ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-button-border);
  background: var(--vscode-button-background);
  color: var(--vscode-button-foreground);

}

}

.btn:disabled {

}

.btn-secondary {
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground);
  color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground);
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground);
}

/* ── 工作台页 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.workbench-controls {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.generate-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.generate-row .md-filename {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 11px;

  overflow: hidden;

}

.status-row {
  font-size: 11px;

  line-height: 1.4;
}

.status-error {
  color: var(--vscode-errorForeground);
}

/* ── 设置页 ────────────────────────────────────── */
.settings-section {
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.settings-section-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  opacity: 0.8;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

/* ── 多行文本框 ────────────────────────────────── */
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;

}

.textarea:focus {

}

/* ── 占位提示 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.placeholder-text {
  font-size: 12px;
  opacity: 0.5;
  padding: 12px 0;
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { WebviewMessage, ExtensionMessage } from './shared';

/** 生成随机 nonce 用于 CSP */
function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

/**
 * 侧栏 Webview 提供器。
 * 生成带 CSP 的 HTML，加载 React 前端，管理双向 postMessage 通信。
 */
export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly onMessage: (message: WebviewMessage) => void | Promise<void>,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    const nonce = getNonce();

    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
    };

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      this.onMessage(msg);
    });

    const jsUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    const cspSource = webview.cspSource;

    webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${cspSource} https:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${jsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }

  /** 向 Webview 发送消息 */
  postMessage(message: ExtensionMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(message);
  }

  /** 素材库增删后必须重设 localResourceRoots 以包含新路径 */
  updateLocalResourceRoots(): void {
    if (this._view) {
      this._view.webview.options = {
        ...this._view.webview.options,
        localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
      };
    }
  }

  /** 构建 localResourceRoots：media 目录 + 全部工作区根 */
  private buildLocalResourceRoots(): vscode.Uri[] {
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media'),
    ];
    const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
    if (workspaceFolders) {
      for (const folder of workspaceFolders) {
        roots.push(folder.uri);
      }
    }
    return roots;
  }
}

```

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import * as Select from '@radix-ui/react-select';
import {
  AppConfig,
  ExtensionMessage,
  BASE_URL_OPTIONS,
  MODEL_OPTIONS,
  ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS,
  IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS,
} from '../src/shared';

// VS Code webview API
declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(message: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};

const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ── 主应用 ────────────────────────────────────────

function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMdPath, setActiveMdPath] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [currentTab, setCurrentTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState('');
  const [statusError, setStatusError] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (event: MessageEvent<ExtensionMessage>) => {
      const msg = event.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMdPath(msg.activeMdPath);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.updates } : null));
          break;
        case 'activeMdChanged':
          setActiveMdPath(msg.path);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const updateConfig = useCallback((updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => {
    setConfig((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...updates } : null));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', updates });
  }, []);

  const setApiKey = useCallback((key: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setApiKey', key });
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中…</div>;
  }

  const setStatus = (msg: string, err = false) => {
    setStatusMessage(msg);
    setStatusError(err);
  };

  return (
    <Tabs.Root value={currentTab} onValueChange={setCurrentTab}>
      <Tabs.List className="tab-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="workbench">
          工作台
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="tasks">
          任务
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="settings">
          设置
        </Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          activeMdPath={activeMdPath}
          statusMessage={statusMessage}
          statusError={statusError}
          onSetStatus={setStatus}
          onUpdateConfig={updateConfig}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab config={config} onUpdateConfig={updateConfig} onSetApiKey={setApiKey} />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ── 工作台标签页 ──────────────────────────────────

function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  activeMdPath,
  statusMessage,
  statusError,
  onSetStatus,
  onUpdateConfig,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  activeMdPath: string | null;
  statusMessage: string;
  statusError: boolean;
  onSetStatus: (msg: string, err?: boolean) => void;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
}) {
  const mdFileName = activeMdPath
    ? activeMdPath.replace(/^.*[\\/]/, '')
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  const handleGenerate = () => {
    if (!activeMdPath) {
      onSetStatus('请先打开 Markdown 文件', true);
      return;
    }
    onSetStatus('生成请求已发送…');
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  };

  const handlePreview = () => {
    if (!activeMdPath) {
      onSetStatus('请先打开 Markdown 文件', true);
      return;
    }
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* 素材库区 — M4 实现 */}
      <div className="placeholder-text">素材库将在 M4 实现</div>

      {/* 控件区 */}
      <div className="workbench-controls">
        <SelectField
          label="模型"
          value={config.model}
          options={MODEL_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ model: v })}
        />
        <SelectField
          label="分辨率"
          value={config.imageSize}
          options={IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ imageSize: v })}
        />
        <SelectField
          label="比例"
          value={config.aspectRatio}
          options={ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ aspectRatio: v })}
        />
        <Stepper
          label="并发"
          value={config.concurrency}
          min={1}
          max={10}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ concurrency: v })}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="md-filename" title={activeMdPath || undefined}>
          {mdFileName}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={handlePreview}>
          预览请求
        </button>
        <button className="btn" onClick={handleGenerate}>
          生成
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      <div className={`status-row ${statusError ? 'status-error' : ''}`}>
        {statusMessage}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 任务标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function TasksTab() {
  return (
    <div className="placeholder-text">
      任务列表将在 M3 实现（异步任务机制）。
      <br />
      当前请通过右键菜单「Image Flow: 生成 AI 图片」触发生成。
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 设置标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function SettingsTab({
  config,
  onUpdateConfig,
  onSetApiKey,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
  onSetApiKey: (key: string) => void;
}) {
  const openApiKeyPage = () => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', updates: {} });
    // 经扩展用系统浏览器打开
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = 'command:image-flow.openApiKeyPage';
    a.click();
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* API Key */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <div className="password-row">
            <input
              className="text-input"
              type="password"
              value={config.apiKey}
              placeholder="输入 API Key (sk-…)"
              onChange={(e) => {
                onSetApiKey(e.target.value);
                onUpdateConfig({ apiKey: e.target.value });
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>
        <button className="inline-link" onClick={openApiKeyPage}>
          获取 API Key →
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 节点 */}
      <div className="form-row">
        <div className="form-label">API 节点</div>
        <SelectField
          value={config.baseUrl}
          options={BASE_URL_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ baseUrl: v })}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 每行张数 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">缩略图</div>
        <Stepper
          label="工作台每行张数"
          value={config.workbenchCols}
          min={1}
          max={8}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ workbenchCols: v })}
        />
        <div style={{ height: 8 }} />
        <Stepper
          label="任务栏每行张数"
          value={config.tasksCols}
          min={1}
          max={8}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ tasksCols: v })}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 模型注入提示词 — M6 实现 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="placeholder-text">模型注入提示词编辑将在 M6 实现</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 通用组件 ──────────────────────────────────────

function SelectField({
  label,
  value,
  options,
  onChange,
}: {
  label?: string;
  value: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="form-row">
      {label && <div className="form-label">{label}</div>}
      <Select.Root value={value} onValueChange={onChange}>
        <Select.Trigger className="select-trigger">
          <Select.Value />
          <Select.Icon className="select-icon">▼</Select.Icon>
        </Select.Trigger>
        <Select.Portal>
          <Select.Content className="select-content" position="popper" sideOffset={2}>
            <Select.Viewport>
              {options.map((opt) => (
                <Select.Item key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="select-item">
                  <Select.ItemText>{opt.label}</Select.ItemText>
                </Select.Item>
              ))}
            </Select.Viewport>
          </Select.Content>
        </Select.Portal>
      </Select.Root>
    </div>
  );
}

function Stepper({
  label,
  value,
  min,
  max,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  min: number;
  max: number;
  onChange: (value: number) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="form-row">
      <div className="form-label">{label}</div>
      <div className="stepper">
        <button
          className="stepper-btn"
          disabled={value <= min}
          onClick={() => onChange(value - 1)}
        >
          −
        </button>
        <span className="stepper-value">{value}</span>
        <button
          className="stepper-btn"
          disabled={value >= max}
          onClick={() => onChange(value + 1)}
        >
          +
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;

```
</details>

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/extension.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadImage, Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize } from './api';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { WebviewMessage, AppConfig } from './shared';

// ── 工具函数 ──────────────────────────────────────

function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const yy = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const MM = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const dd = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const HH = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const SS = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${yy}${MM}${dd}${HH}${mm}${SS}`;
}

function findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seq}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  return dirPath;
}

const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set(['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg']);

function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

/** 获取当前生效 MD 路径：跟随活动编辑器，非 MD 标签不清空 */
function getActiveMdPath(): string | null {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor) return null;
  const fsPath = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
  return fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? fsPath : null;
}

function getMdBasename(mdUri: vscode.Uri): string {
  return path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
}

// ── activate ──────────────────────────────────────

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ── 配置管理器 ──
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(
    context.secrets,
    context.globalState,
    context.workspaceState,
  );

  // ── 当前生效 MD（跟随活动编辑器） ──
  let activeMdUri: vscode.Uri | null = getActiveMdUri();

  function getActiveMdUri(): vscode.Uri | null {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor) return null;
    return editor.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? editor.document.uri : null;
  }

  // ── 侧栏提供器 ──
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await configManager.getAll();
        const activeMdPath = getActiveMdPath();
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'init', config, activeMdPath });
        break;
      }
      case 'setApiKey':
        await configManager.setApiKey(msg.key);
        break;
      case 'setConfig': {
        const updates = { ...msg.updates };
        // apiKey 走 secrets 单独处理
        if ('apiKey' in updates) {
          await configManager.setApiKey(updates.apiKey as string);
          delete updates.apiKey;
        }
        if (Object.keys(updates).length > 0) {
          await configManager.setConfig(updates);
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'generate':
        await executeGenerate(activeMdUri, configManager);
        break;
      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
        break;
    }
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // ── 生效 MD 跟随活动编辑器 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor((editor) => {
      if (!editor) return;
      const newPath = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
      if (newPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        activeMdUri = editor.document.uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: newPath });
      }
      // 非 MD 不清空（保留上一个生效 MD）
    }),
  );

  // ── 打开 API Key 获取页面 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.openApiKeyPage', () => {
      vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse('https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys'));
    }),
  );

  // ── 生成图片命令 ──
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand(
    'image-flow.generateImage',
    async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = uri || activeMdUri;
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件，或右键 .md 文件触发');
        return;
      }
      // 右键触发生成时目标 MD 成为生效 MD
      if (uri) {
        activeMdUri = uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: uri.fsPath });
      }
      await executeGenerate(mdUri, configManager);
    },
  );

  // ── 预览请求命令（M5 实现） ──
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd, previewCmd);
}

// ── 生成执行（M2 仍用同步 API，M3 改为异步） ──

async function executeGenerate(
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
  configManager: ConfigManager,
): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const fsPath = mdUri.fsPath;
    if (!fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请对 Markdown 文件使用此命令');
      return;
    }

    const config = await configManager.getAll();
    if (!config.apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置中配置 API Key');
      return;
    }

    // 读取并解析 Markdown
    const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(fsPath, 'utf-8');
    const mdDir = path.dirname(fsPath);

    let parseResult;
    try {
      parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir);
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
      return;
    }

    // 创建任务文件夹
    const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
    const taskDir = findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir, ts);
    fs.mkdirSync(taskDir, { recursive: true });

    const mdBasename = getMdBasename(mdUri);

    // 同步提交
    const allErrors: string[] = [];
    let imageCount = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < config.concurrency; i++) {
      try {
        const response = await submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, {
          model: config.model as Model,
          prompt: parseResult.promptText,
          images: parseResult.images,
          aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio as AspectRatio,
          imageSize: config.imageSize as ImageSize,
        });

        if (response.results && response.results.length > 0) {
          for (const result of response.results) {
            imageCount++;
            const ext = extFromUrl(result.url);
            const fileName = `${mdBasename}-${imageCount}.${ext}`;
            const destPath = path.join(taskDir, fileName);
            await downloadImage(result.url, destPath);
          }
        }
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        allErrors.push(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
      }
    }

    // 汇总
    if (imageCount === 0 && allErrors.length > 0) {
      try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`);
    } else if (allErrors.length > 0) {
      const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `部分生成失败（${imageCount} 张成功）：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`,
      );
    } else {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
        `生成完成，${imageCount} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskDir)}`,
      );
    }
  } catch (err: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
  }
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 无清理操作
}

```

## 🤷 Command `/harness-dev`

`09:19:58`

**Args:** `按计划实施 M3（异步任务机制）：改为 replyType:async 提交 + 单定时器后台轮询 + globalState 持久化 + 重启续拉；多任务并发互不干扰。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。`

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/.claude/skills/harness-dev
> 
> # {{PROJECT_NAME}}实现专才
> 
> ## 角色
> 
> 我是 {{PROJECT_NAME}} 的实现者。我的工作不是再决定“做什么”，而是把已经冻结的判断变成可运行代码，并把变更传播、测试闭环、生成物一致性一起收掉。
> 
> ## 核心张力
> 
> - **快修 vs 契约安全**
>   判断函数：如果改的是契约，先列消费方；如果只是实现，才允许局部收口。
> - **局部实现 vs 系统传播**
>   判断函数：任何共享 schema、事件、生成物、配置 key 都按契约处理。
> - **简洁 vs 静默降级**
>   判断函数：{{PROJECT_NAME}} 宁可大声报错，也不靠 silent fallback 维持“看起来能跑”。
> 
> ## 工作顺序
> 
> 1. 重新验证计划引用的文件、函数、schema 仍存在
> 2. 判断改的是 `contract` 还是 `implementation`
> 3. `grep` 消费方，不靠想象
> 4. 修改代码和测试
> 5. 追生成物、类型、文档是否需要同步
> 6. 跑指定验证，直到闭环
> 
> ## {{PROJECT_NAME}} 实现规则
> 
> - 共享 response model、事件 payload、工具定义、类型导出都是契约
> - generated artifact 变了，消费方也必须跟
> - 配置 key、环境变量、路由路径不是“内部细节”
> - 用户可见入口地址是产品契约：正式公网入口只允许 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` / `<NETWORK_REDACTED>`，不要把原始 IP 重新写回 README、默认值、前端 fallback 或分享链接
> - demo / admin 发布必须区分 `prod` 和 `preview`：构建基址、verify URL、远端目录都要跟 channel 对齐，不能混发
> - 改公网 edge 路由时，先改 `ops/nginx/*.conf`，再走 `bash scripts/deploy-edge.sh --yes`，不要只在线上手改 nginx
> - 不把必须参数做成 Optional 兜底
> - 不用 prompt 替代代码保障
> - **Runtime Fix ≠ Closure** — 症状消失不等于修好了。修了 bug 必须分析复发路径、确定防护机制（guard/test/type/convention）、关闭 `prevention_status`。只有 Level 2（复发路径关闭）才算 Fixed，Level 1（症状消失）只算 Runtime Fixed
> 
> ## 发布实现补充
> 
> 涉及部署脚本、nginx、demo 构建或公网地址时，默认补做这几件事：
> 
> 1. `grep` 代码 / 文档 / skill / README 中的旧入口，确认不会把 IP 当成用户入口继续传播
> 2. 同步 `prod` / `preview` 两个发布面，避免只修正式不修预发，或者反过来
> 3. 如果改了 demo 构建基址，重建产物并验证 `dist/index.html` 中的 base 路径
> 4. 如果改了公网入口，验证至少一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 和一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 路径可达
> 
> ## 来自 crystal-learn 的注入
> 
> **INV-1 波纹衰减**：改了源头不等于改完。行动：函数签名、schema、字段名、路由改动后，必须 `grep` 消费方。
> 
> **INV-5 语义搭便车**：表面一样不代表语义一样。行动：复用模式前先问“原来为什么这么写”“这里条件是否相同”“不同的话调什么”。
> 
> ## Output Contract
> 
> 每次实现任务结束，默认给：
> 
> 1. `change propagation checklist`
>    - 改了哪些契约
>    - 消费方都在哪里
>    - 哪些已同步
> 2. `implementation closure`
>    - 代码入口改了什么
>    - 是否引入新的 fallback / drift 风险
> 3. `test closure`
>    - 跑了哪些测试
>    - 哪些没跑、为什么
> 
> ## 不做什么
> 
> - 不替 `lead` 或 `arch` 补边界决策
> - 不复活 archived V1 skill 世界观
> - 不把“编译过了”当成数据链路已通
> 
> 
> ARGUMENTS: 按计划实施 M3（异步任务机制）：改为 replyType:async 提交 + 单定时器后台轮询 + globalState 持久化 + 重启续拉；多任务并发互不干扰。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。

### 🤖 Assistant: *按 PLAN 实施 M3 异步任务机制。先读取需要修改的核心文件。*

`09:20:19`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> The user wants me to implement M3: Async task mechanism. Let me review what needs to change from the PLAN:
> 
> M3 scope:
> - `src/taskManager.ts` (new) — Task lifecycle management
> - Changes to `src/api.ts` — pollResult already exists from M1, need to verify
> - Changes to `src/extension.ts` — integrate taskManager, replace synchronous generate flow
> - Changes to `src/shared.ts` — add task-related message types
> - Changes to `media/sidebar.tsx` — update tasks tab with real task data
> 
> Key requirements from the spec:
> 1. Change to `replyType: 'async'` submission
> 2. Single timer (4s interval) for polling all running jobs
> 3. Reentry lock: don't start new poll if previous one still running
> 4. Persist to globalState: tasks with job ids, status, downloaded images, timestamps
> 5. Resume on activation: read persisted tasks, start polling immediately
> 6. Timeout reset on session start (10min timeout counted from session start)
> 7. Task real start time preserved (not reset on restart)
> 8. Submitting jobs without id → mark as failed on resume ("提交未完成")
> 9. All N submissions failed → remove task, delete empty folder, aggregate errors
> 10. Download: succeeded jobs → download to task folder, sequential numbering across jobs
> 11. When task finishes: remove from persisted list; if failures → warning (if any success) or error notification + delete empty folder
> 12. `submitGenerate` should use `replyType: 'async'` to get job id, not wait for results
> 
> Let me read the current relevant files first.

```typescript
import * as https from 'https';
import * as http from 'http';
import * as fs from 'fs';

// ── 类型 ────────────────────────────────────────────

export type Model = 'nano-banana-2' | 'nano-banana-pro' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';
export type AspectRatio = '1:1' | '16:9' | '9:16' | '4:3' | '3:4';
export type ImageSize = '1K' | '2K' | '4K';

export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: Model;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio?: AspectRatio;
  imageSize?: ImageSize;
}

export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

// ── gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表 ──────────────────

const PIXEL_SIZE_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': '1008x1008', '2K': '1440x1440', '4K': '2000x2000' },
  '3:4':  { '1K': '864x1152',  '2K': '1216x1632', '4K': '1728x2304' },
  '4:3':  { '1K': '1152x864',  '2K': '1632x1216', '4K': '2304x1728' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1360x768',  '2K': '1888x1056', '4K': '2672x1504' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '768x1360',  '2K': '1056x1888', '4K': '1504x2672' },
};

function toPixelSize(aspectRatio: AspectRatio, imageSize: ImageSize): string {
  const size = PIXEL_SIZE_TABLE[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize];
  if (!size) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的像素换算：${aspectRatio} + ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return size;
}

// ── 请求体构造 ────────────────────────────────────

export function buildRequestBody(req: GenerateRequest, replyType: 'json' | 'async' = 'json'): Record<string, unknown> {
  const { model, prompt, images, aspectRatio = '3:4', imageSize = '1K' } = req;
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = { model, prompt, images, replyType };

  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) {
    body.aspectRatio = aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = imageSize;
  } else if (model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    body.aspectRatio = aspectRatio;
  } else if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    body.aspectRatio = toPixelSize(aspectRatio, imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

// ── HTTP 请求工具 ─────────────────────────────────

function httpRequest(
  url: string,
  options: { method: string; headers: Record<string, string>; body?: string; timeout?: number }
): Promise<{ statusCode: number; data: string }> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const urlObj = new URL(url);
    const mod = urlObj.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http;
    const req = mod.request(
      url,
      { method: options.method, headers: options.headers, timeout: options.timeout || 30000 },
      (res) => {
        let data = '';
        res.on('data', (chunk: string) => (data += chunk));
        res.on('end', () => resolve({ statusCode: res.statusCode || 0, data }));
      }
    );
    req.on('error', reject);
    req.on('timeout', () => {
      req.destroy();
      reject(new Error('请求超时'));
    });
    if (options.body) {
      req.write(options.body);
    }
    req.end();
  });
}

// ── 运行时校验 ────────────────────────────────────

function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof d.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：缺少 id');
  }
  const validStatuses = ['running', 'violation', 'succeeded', 'failed'];
  if (typeof d.status !== 'string' || !validStatuses.includes(d.status)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：无效 status "${d.status}"`);
  }
  return d as unknown as GenerateResponse;
}

// ── 瞬时错误判定 ──────────────────────────────────

export function isTransientError(statusCode: number): boolean {
  return statusCode >= 500 || statusCode === 429 || statusCode === 0;
}

// ── public API ────────────────────────────────────

/** 提交同步生成（replyType=json），直接返回结果 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  req: GenerateRequest
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildRequestBody(req, 'json');
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;

  const { statusCode, data } = await httpRequest(url, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  });

  if (statusCode >= 400) {
    if (isTransientError(statusCode)) {
      throw new Error(`服务器瞬时错误（HTTP ${statusCode}），请稍后重试`);
    }
    let errMsg = `请求失败（HTTP ${statusCode}）`;
    try {
      const errBody = JSON.parse(data);
      if (errBody.error) {
        errMsg += `: ${typeof errBody.error === 'string' ? errBody.error : errBody.error.message || JSON.stringify(errBody.error)}`;
      }
    } catch {
      errMsg += `: ${data.slice(0, 200)}`;
    }
    throw new Error(errMsg);
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
  const response = validateGenerateResponse(parsed);

  if (response.status === 'violation') {
    throw new Error(`内容违规：${response.error || '请求被拒绝'}`);
  }
  if (response.status === 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`生成失败：${response.error || '未知错误'}`);
  }

  return response;
}

/** 查询异步任务结果（M3 用） */
export async function pollResult(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;

  const { statusCode, data } = await httpRequest(url, {
    method: 'GET',
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
    timeout: 30000,
  });

  if (isTransientError(statusCode)) {
    throw new Error(`瞬时错误（HTTP ${statusCode}）`);
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
  return validateGenerateResponse(parsed);
}

// ── 下载工具 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** 下载单张图片到本地路径，瞬时错误抛异常供调用方重试 */
export function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const file = fs.createWriteStream(destPath);
    const protocol = url.startsWith('https') ? https : http;
    const req = protocol.get(
      url,
      { timeout: 30000 },
      (res) => {
        if (!res.statusCode) {
          file.close();
          fs.unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error('下载失败：无状态码'));
          return;
        }
        if (isTransientError(res.statusCode)) {
          file.close();
          fs.unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error(`瞬时错误（HTTP ${res.statusCode}）`));
          return;
        }
        if (res.statusCode >= 400) {
          file.close();
          fs.unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error(`下载失败（HTTP ${res.statusCode}）`));
          return;
        }
        res.pipe(file);
        file.on('finish', () => {
          file.close();
          resolve();
        });
      }
    );
    req.on('error', (err) => {
      file.close();
      try { fs.unlinkSync(destPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      reject(err);
    });
    req.on('timeout', () => {
      req.destroy();
      file.close();
      try { fs.unlinkSync(destPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      reject(new Error('下载超时'));
    });
  });
}

/** 根据扩展名推断 MIME 类型 */
export function getMimeType(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml',
  };
  return mimeMap[ext.toLowerCase()] || 'image/png';
}
```

<details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadImage, Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize } from './api';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { WebviewMessage } from './shared';

// ── 工具函数 ──────────────────────────────────────

function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const yy = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const MM = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const dd = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const HH = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const SS = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${yy}${MM}${dd}${HH}${mm}${SS}`;
}

function findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seq}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  return dirPath;
}

const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set(['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg']);

function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

/** 获取当前生效 MD 路径：跟随活动编辑器，非 MD 标签不清空 */
function getActiveMdPath(): string | null {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor) return null;
  const fsPath = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
  return fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? fsPath : null;
}

function getMdBasename(mdUri: vscode.Uri): string {
  return path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');
}

// ── activate ──────────────────────────────────────

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ── 配置管理器 ──
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(
    context.secrets,
    context.globalState,
    context.workspaceState,
  );

  // ── 当前生效 MD（跟随活动编辑器） ──
  let activeMdUri: vscode.Uri | null = getActiveMdUri();

  function getActiveMdUri(): vscode.Uri | null {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor) return null;
    return editor.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? editor.document.uri : null;
  }

  // ── 侧栏提供器 ──
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await configManager.getAll();
        const activeMdPath = getActiveMdPath();
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'init', config, activeMdPath });
        break;
      }
      case 'setApiKey':
        await configManager.setApiKey(msg.key);
        break;
      case 'setConfig': {
        const updates = { ...msg.updates };
        // apiKey 走 secrets 单独处理
        if ('apiKey' in updates) {
          await configManager.setApiKey(updates.apiKey as string);
          delete updates.apiKey;
        }
        if (Object.keys(updates).length > 0) {
          await configManager.setConfig(updates);
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'generate':
        if (activeMdUri) {
          await executeGenerate(activeMdUri, configManager);
        } else {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
        }
        break;
      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
        break;
    }
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // ── 生效 MD 跟随活动编辑器 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor((editor) => {
      if (!editor) return;
      const newPath = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
      if (newPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        activeMdUri = editor.document.uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: newPath });
      }
      // 非 MD 不清空（保留上一个生效 MD）
    }),
  );

  // ── 打开 API Key 获取页面 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.openApiKeyPage', () => {
      vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse('https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys'));
    }),
  );

  // ── 生成图片命令 ──
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand(
    'image-flow.generateImage',
    async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = uri || activeMdUri;
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件，或右键 .md 文件触发');
        return;
      }
      // 右键触发生成时目标 MD 成为生效 MD
      if (uri) {
        activeMdUri = uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: uri.fsPath });
      }
      await executeGenerate(mdUri, configManager);
    },
  );

  // ── 预览请求命令（M5 实现） ──
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd, previewCmd);
}

// ── 生成执行（M2 仍用同步 API，M3 改为异步） ──

async function executeGenerate(
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
  configManager: ConfigManager,
): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const fsPath = mdUri.fsPath;
    if (!fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请对 Markdown 文件使用此命令');
      return;
    }

    const config = await configManager.getAll();
    if (!config.apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置中配置 API Key');
      return;
    }

    // 读取并解析 Markdown
    const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(fsPath, 'utf-8');
    const mdDir = path.dirname(fsPath);

    let parseResult;
    try {
      parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir);
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
      return;
    }

    // 创建任务文件夹
    const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
    const taskDir = findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir, ts);
    fs.mkdirSync(taskDir, { recursive: true });

    const mdBasename = getMdBasename(mdUri);

    // 同步提交
    const allErrors: string[] = [];
    let imageCount = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < config.concurrency; i++) {
      try {
        const response = await submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, {
          model: config.model as Model,
          prompt: parseResult.promptText,
          images: parseResult.images,
          aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio as AspectRatio,
          imageSize: config.imageSize as ImageSize,
        });

        if (response.results && response.results.length > 0) {
          for (const result of response.results) {
            imageCount++;
            const ext = extFromUrl(result.url);
            const fileName = `${mdBasename}-${imageCount}.${ext}`;
            const destPath = path.join(taskDir, fileName);
            await downloadImage(result.url, destPath);
          }
        }
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        allErrors.push(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
      }
    }

    // 汇总
    if (imageCount === 0 && allErrors.length > 0) {
      try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`);
    } else if (allErrors.length > 0) {
      const uniqueErrors = [...new Set(allErrors)];
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `部分生成失败（${imageCount} 张成功）：${uniqueErrors.join('；')}`,
      );
    } else {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
        `生成完成，${imageCount} 张图片已保存至 ${path.basename(taskDir)}`,
      );
    }
  } catch (err: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
  }
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 无清理操作
}

```
