> 
> Let me design the task data structures:
> 
> ```typescript
> export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
> 
> export interface Job {
>   jobIndex: number;        // 0-based index within task
>   jobId?: string;          // API job id (undefined while submitting)
>   status: JobStatus;
>   error?: string;
>   progress?: number;       // 0-100 from API
>   downloadedImages: string[]; // local file paths
> }
> 
> export interface Task {
>   taskId: string;          // unique identifier
>   folderName: string;      // task folder basename
>   taskDir: string;         // full absolute path to task folder
>   mdPath: string;          // source .md file path
>   model: string;
>   jobs: Job[];             // N jobs (N = concurrency)
>   startedAt: number;       // epoch ms (persisted, never reset)
>   sessionStartedAt: number; // epoch ms of current session (for timeout)
> }
> ```
> 
> For the TaskManager class:
> 
> ```typescript
> export class TaskManager {
>   private tasks: Task[] = [];
>   private timer?: NodeJS.Timeout;
>   private polling = false;  // reentry lock
>   
>   constructor(
>     private readonly configManager: ConfigManager,
>     private readonly globalState: vscode.Memento,
>     private readonly sidebarProvider: SidebarProvider,
>   ) {}
>   
>   // Submit a new task
>   async submit(mdPath: string, concurrency: number): Promise<void> {
>     // 1. Parse markdown
>     // 2. Create task folder
>     // 3. Create Task with N submitting jobs
>     // 4. Persist
>     // 5. Start submitting in background
>     // 6. Start timer if not running
>     // 7. Push task state to sidebar
>   }
>   
>   // Resume persisted tasks on activation
>   async resume(): Promise<void> {
>     // 1. Read tasks from globalState
>     // 2. Mark 'submitting' jobs without id as 'failed'
>     // 3. Reset session timers
>     // 4. Start polling
>   }
>   
>   // Background job submission
>   private async submitJobs(task: Task): Promise<void> {
>     // Fire N concurrent POST requests with replyType:async
>     // Update job status as responses come in
>     // Persist after each change
>   }
>   
>   // Timer-driven polling
>   private startTimer(): void {
>     // 4s interval, single timer for all tasks
>   }
>   
>   private async poll(): Promise<void> {
>     // Reentry lock check
>     // Poll all running jobs
>     // Download succeeded results
>     // Handle failed/violation
>     // Check timeout
>     // Clean up completed tasks
>     // Persist changes
>   }
> }
> ```
> 
> Now let me think about the persistence format in globalState:
> ```typescript
> // Key: 'imageflow.tasks'
> // Value: Task[] (serialized as JSON)
> ```
> 
> For the sidebar task state messages, I need to define what data the webview needs:
> ```typescript
> interface TaskCardData {
>   taskId: string;
>   folderName: string;
>   model: string;
>   totalJobs: number;
>   doneJobs: number;
>   failedJobs: number;
>   submittingCount: number;
>   runningCount: number;
>   downloadedImages: string[]; // webview URIs
>   errors: string[];
>   startedAt: number; // epoch ms
>   elapsed: number;   // seconds
> }
> ```
> 
> For M3, I'll keep the TasksTab simple - show a list of tasks with their status. Full UI polish (progress bars, timers, collapsible cards) comes in M7.
> 
> Let me now think about the flow in detail:
> 
> ### Submit flow:
> 1. User clicks "generate" in sidebar or right-click menu
> 2. TaskManager receives the MD path
> 3. Parse markdown, create task folder
> 4. Create Task object with N jobs (all `submitting`)
> 5. Save to globalState
> 6. Push task state to sidebar
> 7. Start N async POST requests (fire-and-forget with callbacks)
> 8. Each POST response → job gets an id → status becomes `running`
> 9. If all N fail → remove task, delete empty folder, notify
> 10. Start polling timer (if not already running)
> 
> ### Poll flow:
> 1. Timer fires every 4s
> 2. Check reentry lock (is previous poll still running?)
> 3. For each task, for each running job → call pollResult()
> 4. If succeeded → download images to task folder
> 5. If failed/violation → record error
> 6. Check if all jobs in task are done → complete task
> 7. Check timeout (sessionStartedAt + 10min < now) → mark remaining as failed
> 8. Push updates to sidebar
> 9. Persist to globalState
> 10. If no more running jobs → stop timer
> 
> ### Resume flow:
> 1. Read tasks from globalState
> 2. For each task:
>    - Mark `submitting` jobs without id as `failed` ("提交未完成")
>    - Reset `sessionStartedAt` to now (so timeout starts fresh)
> 3. Start polling

> Let me now think about the data model more carefully. The spec says:
> 
> - "进行中任务（含 job id、状态、已下载图片、时间戳）持久化进 globalState，状态变更随时落盘"
> - "任务真实开始时间（用于 UI 显示已进行时长）单独保存，重启不重置"
> - "提交途中被关闭的 job（submitting 态无 id）重启后直接判失败（「提交未完成」），不得永久卡住"
> - "超时计时按「本次会话起算」重置——关机时长不计入，离线超 10 分钟的任务不得被误判超时"
> 
> So the Task needs:
> - `startedAt` — real start time, persisted, never reset (for elapsed display)
> - `sessionStartedAt` — reset on each resume (for timeout calculation)
> 
> And the job needs:
> - `jobId` — from API, undefined while submitting
> - `status` — 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation'
> - On resume, jobs with status 'submitting' and no jobId → mark as 'failed'
> 
> For the download image naming, the spec says:
> "文件名 {md文件名}-{序号}.{扩展名}，序号在整个任务内接续编号（多 job 不得重名互相覆盖）"
>

> - "轮询必须有重入锁：一轮未结束（下载图片可能超过间隔）不得开启下一轮"
> 
> This is straightforward: 
> - A single `setInterval` with 4s interval
> - A `polling` boolean flag
> - Start timer when first running job appears

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/taskManager.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, downloadImage, isTransientError, Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize } from './api';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { TaskData, JobData, TaskSummary } from './shared';

// ── 工具 ──────────────────────────────────────────

function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const yy = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const MM = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const dd = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const HH = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const SS = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${yy}${MM}${dd}${HH}${mm}${SS}`;
}

function findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seq}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  return dirPath;
}

const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set(['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg']);

function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

let taskIdCounter = 0;

function nextTaskId(): string {
  taskIdCounter++;
  return `task-${Date.now()}-${taskIdCounter}`;
}

// ── TaskManager ───────────────────────────────────

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: TaskData[] = [];
  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false;
  private readonly STORE_KEY = 'imageflow.tasks';
  private readonly POLL_MS = 4000;
  private readonly TIMEOUT_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000;
  private disposed = false;

  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private globalState: vscode.Memento,
    private onTaskUpdate: (tasks: TaskData[]) => void,
    private onTaskComplete: (task: TaskData, hasImages: boolean, errors: string[]) => void,
  ) {}

  // ── 提交新任务 ────────────────────────────────

  async submit(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getAll();
    if (!config.apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置中配置 API Key');
      return;
    }

    const fsPath = mdUri.fsPath;
    const mdDir = path.dirname(fsPath);
    const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(fsPath, 'utf-8');

    let parseResult;
    try {
      parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir);
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
      return;
    }

    // 建文件夹
    const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
    const taskDir = findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir, ts);
    fs.mkdirSync(taskDir, { recursive: true });

    // 建 N 个 submitting job
    const N = config.concurrency;
    const now = Date.now();
    const jobs: JobData[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      jobs.push({ jobIndex: i, status: 'submitting', progress: 0, downloadedImages: [] });
    }

    const task: TaskData = {
      taskId: nextTaskId(),
      folderName: path.basename(taskDir),
      taskDir,
      mdPath: fsPath,
      model: config.model,
      jobs,
      startedAt: now,
      sessionStartedAt: now,
    };

    this.tasks.push(task);

    // 立即建卡返回（不等网络）
    this.notify();
    this.persist();

    // 后台并发提交
    this.fireSubmissions(task, parseResult.promptText, parseResult.images, config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, config.aspectRatio, config.imageSize, config.model);
  }

  private async fireSubmissions(
    task: TaskData,
    promptText: string,
    images: string[],
    baseUrl: string,
    apiKey: string,
    aspectRatio: string,
    imageSize: string,
    model: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const N = task.jobs.length;
    const errors: string[] = [];

    const submitOne = async (job: JobData) => {
      try {
        const response = await submitGenerate(baseUrl, apiKey, {
          model: model as Model,
          prompt: promptText,
          images,
          aspectRatio: aspectRatio as AspectRatio,
          imageSize: imageSize as ImageSize,
        }, 'async');
        job.jobId = response.id;
        job.status = 'running';
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
        errors.push(job.error);
      }
      this.notify();
      this.persist();
    };

    // 并发提交
    await Promise.all(task.jobs.map(submitOne));

    // 全部失败 → 移除任务
    if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'running')) {
      this.removeTask(task);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(task.taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      const unique = [...new Set(errors)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成提交失败：${unique.join('；')}`);
      return;
    }

    // 有 running 则确保定时器运转
    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  // ── 轮询 ──────────────────────────────────────

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.timer || this.disposed) return;
    this.timer = setInterval(() => { this.tick(); }, this.POLL_MS);
  }

  private stopTimerIfIdle(): void {
    const hasRunning = this.tasks.some(t => t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'));
    if (!hasRunning && this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }

  private async tick(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.polling) return;
    this.polling = true;
    try {
      const config = await this.configManager.getAll();
      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        if (this.disposed) return;
        await this.pollTask(task, config);
      }
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
    this.stopTimerIfIdle();
  }

  private async pollTask(task: TaskData, config: { baseUrl: string; apiKey: string }): Promise<void> {
    // 超时检查（本次会话起算）
    const elapsed = Date.now() - task.sessionStartedAt;
    if (elapsed > this.TIMEOUT_MS) {
      for (const j of task.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting') {
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.error = '任务超时（10 分钟）';
        }
      }
      this.finalizeTask(task);
      return;
    }

    let changed = false;
    const runningJobs = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running' && j.jobId);

    for (const job of runningJobs) {
      try {
        const result = await pollResult(config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, job.jobId!);
        job.progress = result.progress || 0;

        if (result.status === 'succeeded') {
          job.status = 'succeeded';
          changed = true;
          // 下载结果图
          if (result.results) {
            for (const r of result.results) {
              const imageNum = task.jobs.reduce((sum, j) => sum + j.downloadedImages.length, 0) + 1;
              const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
              const mdBasename = path.basename(task.mdPath, '.md');
              const destPath = path.join(task.taskDir, `${mdBasename}-${imageNum}.${ext}`);
              await downloadImage(r.url, destPath);
              job.downloadedImages.push(destPath);
            }
          }
        } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
          job.status = result.status;
          job.error = result.error || (result.status === 'violation' ? '内容违规' : '生成失败');
          changed = true;
        }
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
        // 瞬时错误保持 running
        if (!isTransientHttpMsg(msg)) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = msg;
          changed = true;
        }
      }

      if (changed) {
        this.notify();
        this.persist();
      }
    }

    // 检查任务是否全部终结
    if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'running' && j.status !== 'submitting' )) {
      this.finalizeTask(task);
    }
  }

  // ── 任务终结 ──────────────────────────────────

  private finalizeTask(task: TaskData): void {
    const hasImages = task.jobs.some(j => j.downloadedImages.length > 0);
    const errors = task.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!);

    this.onTaskComplete(task, hasImages, errors);
    this.removeTask(task);
    this.notify();
    this.persist();
  }

  private removeTask(task: TaskData): void {
    const idx = this.tasks.indexOf(task);
    if (idx >= 0) this.tasks.splice(idx, 1);
  }

  // ── 持久化 ────────────────────────────────────

  private persist(): void {
    const serializable = this.tasks.map(t => ({ ...t }));
    this.globalState.update(this.STORE_KEY, serializable).then(
      undefined,
      () => { /* 忽略持久化错误 */ },
    );
  }

  // ── 重启续拉 ─────────────────────────────────

  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored = this.globalState.get<TaskData[]>(this.STORE_KEY) || [];
    const now = Date.now();

    for (const task of stored) {
      // submitting 态无 jobId → 直接判失败
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting' && !job.jobId) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '提交未完成';
        }
      }
      // 超时按本次会话重置
      task.sessionStartedAt = now;

      // 全部终结的 task 做最终清理
      if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'running' && j.status !== 'submitting')) {
        const hasImages = task.jobs.some(j => j.downloadedImages.length > 0);
        const errors = task.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!);
        this.onTaskComplete(task, hasImages, errors);
        // 不加入 this.tasks——直接丢弃
        continue;
      }

      this.tasks.push(task);
    }

    this.persist();
    this.notify();

    // 有 running job → 立即拉一次并恢复定时器
    if (this.tasks.some(t => t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'))) {
      this.ensureTimer();
      this.tick();
    }
  }

  // ── 状态推送 ──────────────────────────────────

  private notify(): void {
    this.onTaskUpdate(this.tasks);
  }

  /** 获取当前任务列表（供 init 消息用） */
  getTasks(): TaskData[] {
    return this.tasks;
  }

  dispose(): void {
    this.disposed = true;
    if (this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }
}

// ── 辅助 ──────────────────────────────────────────

function isTransientHttpMsg(msg: string): boolean {
  return msg.includes('瞬时错误') || msg.includes('请求超时');
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 前后端共享消息协议与类型。
 * 前端 (media/sidebar.tsx) 与后端 (src/) 共用，单一源避免漂移。
 */

// ── 配置形状 ──────────────────────────────────────

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ── 任务数据 ──────────────────────────────────────

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface JobData {
  jobIndex: number;
  jobId?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  error?: string;
  progress: number;
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

export interface TaskData {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  taskDir: string;
  mdPath: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: JobData[];
  startedAt: number;       // 真实开始时间（持久化，重启不重置）
  sessionStartedAt: number; // 本次会话开始时间（重启重置，用于超时）
}

/** 推送给侧栏的任务摘要 */
export interface TaskSummary {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  totalJobs: number;
  doneJobs: number;
  failedJobs: number;
  submittingCount: number;
  runningCount: number;
  downloadedImages: string[]; // webview URI 化后的路径
  errors: string[];
  startedAt: number;
}

// ── 消息协议 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** Webview → Extension 消息 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; key: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' };

/** Extension → Webview 消息 */
export type ExtensionMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; activeMdPath: string | null; tasks: TaskSummary[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'activeMdChanged'; path: string | null }
  | { type: 'taskStateUpdate'; tasks: TaskSummary[] };

// ── 配置选项（供下拉菜单用） ────────────────────

export const BASE_URL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn', label: '国内节点' },
  { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com', label: '全球节点' },
];

export const MODEL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'nano-banana-2', label: 'nano-banana-2' },
  { value: 'nano-banana-pro', label: 'nano-banana-pro' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2', label: 'gpt-image-2' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2-vip', label: 'gpt-image-2-vip' },
];

export const ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1:1', label: '1:1' },
  { value: '3:4', label: '3:4' },
  { value: '4:3', label: '4:3' },
  { value: '16:9', label: '16:9' },
  { value: '9:16', label: '9:16' },
];

export const IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1K', label: '1K' },
  { value: '2K', label: '2K' },
  { value: '4K', label: '4K' },
];
```

```typescript
  /** 构建 localResourceRoots：media 目录 + 全部工作区根 */
  private buildLocalResourceRoots(): vscode.Uri[] {
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media'),
    ];
    const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
    if (workspaceFolders) {
      for (const folder of workspaceFolders) {
        roots.push(folder.uri);
      }
    }
    return roots;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { TaskManager } from './taskManager';
import { WebviewMessage, TaskData, TaskSummary } from './shared';

// ── activate ──────────────────────────────────────

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ── 配置管理器 ──
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(
    context.secrets,
    context.globalState,
    context.workspaceState,
  );

  // ── 当前生效 MD ──
  let activeMdUri: vscode.Uri | null = getActiveMdUri();
  function getActiveMdUri(): vscode.Uri | null {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor) return null;
    return editor.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? editor.document.uri : null;
  }

  // ── 任务完成回调 ──
  function onTaskComplete(task: TaskData, hasImages: boolean, errors: string[]): void {
    if (!hasImages) {
      // 无成图 → 删除空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try { fs.rmdirSync(task.taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      const unique = [...new Set(errors)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${unique.join('；')}`);
    } else if (errors.length > 0) {
      const unique = [...new Set(errors)];
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `部分生成失败（任务 ${task.folderName}）：${unique.join('；')}`,
      );
    } else {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
        `生成完成，图片已保存至 ${task.folderName}`,
      );
    }
  }

  // ── 任务更新回调 — 汇总为 TaskSummary 推给侧栏 ──
  function pushTaskUpdate(tasks: TaskData[]): void {
    const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
      doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
      runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
      downloadedImages: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages).map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
      errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
    }));
    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries });
  }

  // ── 侧栏提供器 ──
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await configManager.getAll();
        const activeMdPath = activeMdUri?.fsPath || null;
        const tasks = taskManager.getTasks();
        const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => ({
          taskId: t.taskId,
          folderName: t.folderName,
          model: t.model,
          totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
          doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
          failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
          submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
          runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
          downloadedImages: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages).map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
          errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
          startedAt: t.startedAt,
        }));
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'init', config, activeMdPath, tasks: summaries });
        break;
      }
      case 'setApiKey':
        await configManager.setApiKey(msg.key);
        break;
      case 'setConfig': {
        const updates = { ...msg.updates };
        if ('apiKey' in updates) {
          await configManager.setApiKey(updates.apiKey as string);
          delete updates.apiKey;
        }
        if (Object.keys(updates).length > 0) {
          await configManager.setConfig(updates);
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'generate':
        if (activeMdUri) {
          await taskManager.submit(activeMdUri);
        } else {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
        }
        break;
      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
        break;
    }
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // ── 任务管理器 ──
  const taskManager = new TaskManager(configManager, context.globalState, pushTaskUpdate, onTaskComplete);
  context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => taskManager.dispose() });

  // ── 重启续拉 ──
  taskManager.resume();

  // ── 生效 MD 跟随活动编辑器 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor((editor) => {
      if (!editor) return;
      const newPath = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
      if (newPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        activeMdUri = editor.document.uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: newPath });
      }
    }),
  );

  // ── 打开 API Key 获取页面 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.openApiKeyPage', () => {
      vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse('https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys'));
    }),
  );

  // ── 生成图片命令 ──
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand(
    'image-flow.generateImage',
    async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = uri || activeMdUri;
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件，或右键 .md 文件触发');
        return;
      }
      if (uri) {
        activeMdUri = uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: uri.fsPath });
      }
      await taskManager.submit(mdUri);
    },
  );

  // ── 预览请求命令 ──
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd, previewCmd);
}

// ── 工具 ──────────────────────────────────────────

function getActiveMdPath(): string | null {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor) return null;
  return editor.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? editor.document.uri.fsPath : null;
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // TaskManager 通过 subscriptions dispose 清理
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import * as Select from '@radix-ui/react-select';
import {
  AppConfig,
  ExtensionMessage,
  BASE_URL_OPTIONS,
  MODEL_OPTIONS,
  ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS,
  IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS,
} from '../src/shared';

// VS Code webview API
declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(message: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};

const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ── 主应用 ────────────────────────────────────────

function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMdPath, setActiveMdPath] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [currentTab, setCurrentTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState('');
  const [statusError, setStatusError] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (event: MessageEvent<ExtensionMessage>) => {
      const msg = event.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMdPath(msg.activeMdPath);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.updates } : null));
          break;
        case 'activeMdChanged':
          setActiveMdPath(msg.path);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const updateConfig = useCallback((updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => {
    setConfig((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...updates } : null));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', updates });
  }, []);

  const setApiKey = useCallback((key: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setApiKey', key });
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中…</div>;
  }

  const setStatus = (msg: string, err = false) => {
    setStatusMessage(msg);
    setStatusError(err);
  };

  return (
    <Tabs.Root value={currentTab} onValueChange={setCurrentTab}>
      <Tabs.List className="tab-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="workbench">
          工作台
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="tasks">
          任务
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="settings">
          设置
        </Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          activeMdPath={activeMdPath}
          statusMessage={statusMessage}
          statusError={statusError}
          onSetStatus={setStatus}
          onUpdateConfig={updateConfig}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab config={config} onUpdateConfig={updateConfig} onSetApiKey={setApiKey} />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ── 工作台标签页 ──────────────────────────────────

function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  activeMdPath,
  statusMessage,
  statusError,
  onSetStatus,
  onUpdateConfig,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  activeMdPath: string | null;
  statusMessage: string;
  statusError: boolean;
  onSetStatus: (msg: string, err?: boolean) => void;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
}) {
  const mdFileName = activeMdPath
    ? activeMdPath.replace(/^.*[\\/]/, '')
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  const handleGenerate = () => {
    if (!activeMdPath) {
      onSetStatus('请先打开 Markdown 文件', true);
      return;
    }
    onSetStatus('生成请求已发送…');
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  };

  const handlePreview = () => {
    if (!activeMdPath) {
      onSetStatus('请先打开 Markdown 文件', true);
      return;
    }
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* 素材库区 — M4 实现 */}
      <div className="placeholder-text">素材库将在 M4 实现</div>

      {/* 控件区 */}
      <div className="workbench-controls">
        <SelectField
          label="模型"
          value={config.model}
          options={MODEL_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ model: v })}
        />
        <SelectField
          label="分辨率"
          value={config.imageSize}
          options={IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ imageSize: v })}
        />
        <SelectField
          label="比例"
          value={config.aspectRatio}
          options={ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ aspectRatio: v })}
        />
        <Stepper
          label="并发"
          value={config.concurrency}
          min={1}
          max={10}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ concurrency: v })}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="md-filename" title={activeMdPath || undefined}>
          {mdFileName}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={handlePreview}>
          预览请求
        </button>
        <button className="btn" onClick={handleGenerate}>
          生成
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      <div className={`status-row ${statusError ? 'status-error' : ''}`}>
        {statusMessage}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 任务标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function TasksTab() {
  return (
    <div className="placeholder-text">
      任务列表将在 M3 实现（异步任务机制）。
      <br />
      当前请通过右键菜单「Image Flow: 生成 AI 图片」触发生成。
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 设置标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function SettingsTab({
  config,
  onUpdateConfig,
  onSetApiKey,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
  onSetApiKey: (key: string) => void;
}) {
  const openApiKeyPage = () => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', updates: {} });
    // 经扩展用系统浏览器打开
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = 'command:image-flow.openApiKeyPage';
    a.click();
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* API Key */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <div className="password-row">
            <input
              className="text-input"
              type="password"
              value={config.apiKey}
              placeholder="输入 API Key (sk-…)"
              onChange={(e) => {
                onSetApiKey(e.target.value);
                onUpdateConfig({ apiKey: e.target.value });
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>
        <button className="inline-link" onClick={openApiKeyPage}>
          获取 API Key →
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 节点 */}
      <div className="form-row">
        <div className="form-label">API 节点</div>
        <SelectField
          value={config.baseUrl}
          options={BASE_URL_OPTIONS}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ baseUrl: v })}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 每行张数 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">缩略图</div>
        <Stepper
          label="工作台每行张数"
          value={config.workbenchCols}
          min={1}
          max={8}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ workbenchCols: v })}
        />
        <div style={{ height: 8 }} />
        <Stepper
          label="任务栏每行张数"
          value={config.tasksCols}
          min={1}
          max={8}
          onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ tasksCols: v })}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 模型注入提示词 — M6 实现 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="placeholder-text">模型注入提示词编辑将在 M6 实现</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 通用组件 ──────────────────────────────────────

function SelectField({
  label,
  value,
  options,
  onChange,
}: {
  label?: string;
  value: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="form-row">
      {label && <div className="form-label">{label}</div>}
      <Select.Root value={value} onValueChange={onChange}>
        <Select.Trigger className="select-trigger">
          <Select.Value />
          <Select.Icon className="select-icon">▼</Select.Icon>
        </Select.Trigger>
        <Select.Portal>
          <Select.Content className="select-content" position="popper" sideOffset={2}>
            <Select.Viewport>
              {options.map((opt) => (
                <Select.Item key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="select-item">
                  <Select.ItemText>{opt.label}</Select.ItemText>
                </Select.Item>
              ))}
            </Select.Viewport>
          </Select.Content>
        </Select.Portal>
      </Select.Root>
    </div>
  );
}

function Stepper({
  label,
  value,
  min,
  max,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  min: number;
  max: number;
  onChange: (value: number) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="form-row">
      <div className="form-label">{label}</div>
      <div className="stepper">
        <button
          className="stepper-btn"
          disabled={value <= min}
          onClick={() => onChange(value - 1)}
        >
          −
        </button>
        <span className="stepper-value">{value}</span>
        <button
          className="stepper-btn"
          disabled={value >= max}
          onClick={() => onChange(value + 1)}
        >
          +
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;

```

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import * as Select from '@radix-ui/react-select';
import {
  AppConfig,
  ExtensionMessage,
  TaskSummary,
  BASE_URL_OPTIONS,
  MODEL_OPTIONS,
  ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS,
  IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS,
} from '../src/shared';

declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(message: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};

const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ── 主应用 ────────────────────────────────────────

function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMdPath, setActiveMdPath] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [currentTab, setCurrentTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState('');
  const [statusError, setStatusError] = useState(false);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskSummary[]>([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (event: MessageEvent<ExtensionMessage>) => {
      const msg = event.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMdPath(msg.activeMdPath);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.updates } : null));
          break;
        case 'activeMdChanged':
          setActiveMdPath(msg.path);
          break;
        case 'taskStateUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const updateConfig = useCallback((updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => {
    setConfig((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...updates } : null));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', updates });
  }, []);

  const setApiKey = useCallback((key: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setApiKey', key });
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中…</div>;
  }

  const setStatus = (msg: string, err = false) => {
    setStatusMessage(msg);
    setStatusError(err);
  };

  // 有进行中任务时自动切到任务标签
  const activeTaskCount = tasks.filter(t => !isTaskDone(t)).length;

  return (
    <Tabs.Root value={currentTab} onValueChange={setCurrentTab}>
      <Tabs.List className="tab-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="workbench">
          工作台
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="tasks">
          任务{activeTaskCount > 0 ? ` (${activeTaskCount})` : ''}
        </Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tab-trigger" value="settings">
          设置
        </Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          activeMdPath={activeMdPath}
          statusMessage={statusMessage}
          statusError={statusError}
          onSetStatus={setStatus}
          onUpdateConfig={updateConfig}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab tasks={tasks} />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tab-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab config={config} onUpdateConfig={updateConfig} onSetApiKey={setApiKey} />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ── 工作台标签页 ──────────────────────────────────

function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  activeMdPath,
  statusMessage,
  statusError,
  onSetStatus,
  onUpdateConfig,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  activeMdPath: string | null;
  statusMessage: string;
  statusError: boolean;
  onSetStatus: (msg: string, err?: boolean) => void;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
}) {
  const mdFileName = activeMdPath
    ? activeMdPath.replace(/^.*[\\/]/, '')
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  const handleGenerate = () => {
    if (!activeMdPath) {
      onSetStatus('请先打开 Markdown 文件', true);
      return;
    }
    onSetStatus('生成请求已提交，请查看任务页');
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  };

  const handlePreview = () => {
    if (!activeMdPath) {
      onSetStatus('请先打开 Markdown 文件', true);
      return;
    }
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="placeholder-text">素材库将在 M4 实现</div>

      <div className="workbench-controls">
        <SelectField label="模型" value={config.model} options={MODEL_OPTIONS} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ model: v })} />
        <SelectField label="分辨率" value={config.imageSize} options={IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ imageSize: v })} />
        <SelectField label="比例" value={config.aspectRatio} options={ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ aspectRatio: v })} />
        <Stepper label="并发" value={config.concurrency} min={1} max={10} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ concurrency: v })} />
      </div>

      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="md-filename" title={activeMdPath || undefined}>{mdFileName}</span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={handlePreview}>预览请求</button>
        <button className="btn" onClick={handleGenerate}>生成</button>
      </div>

      <div className={`status-row ${statusError ? 'status-error' : ''}`}>{statusMessage}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 任务标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function isTaskDone(t: TaskSummary): boolean {
  return t.submittingCount === 0 && t.runningCount === 0;
}

function formatStartedAt(ts: number): string {
  const d = new Date(ts);
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}:${pad(d.getSeconds())}`;
}

function TasksTab({ tasks }: { tasks: TaskSummary[] }) {
  if (tasks.length === 0) {
    return <div className="placeholder-text">暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中点击「生成」开始。</div>;
  }

  const active = tasks.filter(t => !isTaskDone(t));
  const done = tasks.filter(t => isTaskDone(t));

  return (
    <div>
      {active.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-section">
          <div className="task-section-title">进行中 ({active.length})</div>
          {active.map(t => (
            <TaskCard key={t.taskId} task={t} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {done.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-section">
          <div className="task-section-title">已完成 ({done.length})</div>
          {done.map(t => (
            <TaskCard key={t.taskId} task={t} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function TaskCard({ task: t }: { task: TaskSummary }) {
  const done = isTaskDone(t);
  const statusText = done
    ? `${t.doneJobs}/${t.totalJobs} 张`
    : t.submittingCount > 0
      ? `提交中 ${t.doneJobs + t.failedJobs}/${t.totalJobs}`
      : `生成中 ${t.doneJobs}/${t.totalJobs}${t.failedJobs > 0 ? ` · 失败 ${t.failedJobs}` : ''}`;

  // 聚合进度: 每个job占 1/N, 终结=100, running取进度, submitting=0
  const progress = done
    ? 100
    : t.totalJobs > 0
      ? t.doneJobs * 100 / t.totalJobs
      : 0;

  return (
    <div className={`task-card ${done ? 'task-card-done' : ''}`}>
      <div className="task-card-header">
        <span className="task-card-folder">{t.folderName}</span>
        <span className="task-card-model">({t.model})</span>
      </div>
      <div className="task-card-status">{statusText}</div>
      <div className="task-card-progress-bar">
        <div className="task-card-progress-fill" style={{ width: `${Math.round(progress)}%` }} />
      </div>
      {!done && (
        <div className="task-card-subtitle">
          {t.submittingCount > 0 && `正在提交 ${t.submittingCount} 个请求…`}
          {t.runningCount > 0 && `还有 ${t.runningCount} 张正在生成…`}
        </div>
      )}
      {t.errors.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-card-errors">
          {t.errors.map((e, i) => <div key={i} className="task-card-error">{e}</div>)}
        </div>
      )}
      {t.downloadedImages.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-card-images">
          {t.downloadedImages.map((uri, i) => (
            <img key={i} src={uri} className="task-card-thumb" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 设置标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function SettingsTab({
  config,
  onUpdateConfig,
  onSetApiKey,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
  onSetApiKey: (key: string) => void;
}) {
  const openApiKeyPage = () => {
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = 'command:image-flow.openApiKeyPage';
    a.click();
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <div className="password-row">
            <input
              className="text-input"
              type="password"
              value={config.apiKey}
              placeholder="输入 API Key (sk-…)"
              onChange={(e) => {
                onSetApiKey(e.target.value);
                onUpdateConfig({ apiKey: e.target.value });
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>
        <button className="inline-link" onClick={openApiKeyPage}>获取 API Key →</button>
      </div>

      <div className="form-row">
        <div className="form-label">API 节点</div>
        <SelectField value={config.baseUrl} options={BASE_URL_OPTIONS} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ baseUrl: v })} />
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">缩略图</div>
        <Stepper label="工作台每行张数" value={config.workbenchCols} min={1} max={8} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ workbenchCols: v })} />
        <div style={{ height: 8 }} />
        <Stepper label="任务栏每行张数" value={config.tasksCols} min={1} max={8} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ tasksCols: v })} />
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="placeholder-text">模型注入提示词编辑将在 M6 实现</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 通用组件 ──────────────────────────────────────

function SelectField({
  label,
  value,
  options,
  onChange,
}: {
  label?: string;
  value: string;
  options: { value: string; label: string }[];
  onChange: (value: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="form-row">
      {label && <div className="form-label">{label}</div>}
      <Select.Root value={value} onValueChange={onChange}>
        <Select.Trigger className="select-trigger">
          <Select.Value />
          <Select.Icon className="select-icon">▼</Select.Icon>
        </Select.Trigger>
        <Select.Portal>
          <Select.Content className="select-content" position="popper" sideOffset={2}>
            <Select.Viewport>
              {options.map((opt) => (
                <Select.Item key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="select-item">
                  <Select.ItemText>{opt.label}</Select.ItemText>
                </Select.Item>
              ))}
            </Select.Viewport>
          </Select.Content>
        </Select.Portal>
      </Select.Root>
    </div>
  );
}

function Stepper({
  label,
  value,
  min,
  max,
  onChange,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  min: number;
  max: number;
  onChange: (value: number) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="form-row">
      <div className="form-label">{label}</div>
      <div className="stepper">
        <button className="stepper-btn" disabled={value <= min} onClick={() => onChange(value - 1)}>−</button>
        <span className="stepper-value">{value}</span>
        <button className="stepper-btn" disabled={value >= max} onClick={() => onChange(value + 1)}>+</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
```

```css
.inline-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
  color: var(--vscode-textLink-activeForeground);
}

/* ── 按钮 ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-button-border);
  background: var(--vscode-button-background);
  color: var(--vscode-button-foreground);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.btn:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground);
}

.btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground);
  color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground);
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground);
}

/* ── 工作台页 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.workbench-controls {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.generate-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.generate-row .md-filename {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 11px;
  opacity: 0.7;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.status-row {
  font-size: 11px;
  min-height: 16px;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.status-error {
  color: var(--vscode-errorForeground);
}

/* ── 设置页 ────────────────────────────────────── */
.settings-section {
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.settings-section-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  opacity: 0.8;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

/* ── 多行文本框 ────────────────────────────────── */
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: inherit;
  border-radius: 2px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: 48px;
}

.textarea:focus {
  outline: 1px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

/* ── 占位提示 ──────────────────────────────────── */
.placeholder-text {
  font-size: 12px;
  opacity: 0.5;
  padding: 12px 0;
}

```

```diff
+.task-card-images {

+  margin-top: 6px;
+}
+
+.task-card-thumb {
+  width: 40px;
+  height: 40px;

+  border-radius: 2px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border);

+}

+.task-card-thumb:hover {
```

#### 💻 Bash: *Commit M3 implementation*

`09:25:22`

```bash
$ git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
M3: 异步任务机制 — replyType:async + 单定时器轮询 + 持久化 + 重启续拉

新增 taskManager.ts：任务生命周期管理（submitting→running→succeeded/failed/
violation），并发提交 N 个 async job，共用单定时器（4s）带重入锁轮询，
globalState 持久化，resume() 重启续拉（submitting 无 id 判失败、
超时按本次会话重置）。

API：submitGenerate 新增 replyType 参数支持 'async'。
共享类型：ExtensionMessage 扩展 taskStateUpdate 与 init.tasks 字段。
侧栏：任务页展示进行中/已完成卡片，含进度条、状态文本和缩略图。

验证：npm run compile 全绿（双 tsc + ESLint + esbuild）。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
```

<details>

> ---
> 
> ## M3 完成 — change propagation checklist
> 
> ### 改了哪些契约
> 
> | 契约 | 变更 | 消费方 |
> |------|------|--------|
> | `src/shared.ts` | 新增 `JobData` / `TaskData` / `TaskSummary` / `JobStatus` 类型；`ExtensionMessage` 新增 `taskStateUpdate`，`init` 新增 `tasks` 字段 | `extension.ts`, `taskManager.ts`, `media/sidebar.tsx` |
> | `src/api.ts` `submitGenerate` | 新增 `replyType?: 'json' \| 'async'` 参数（默认 `'json'`） | `taskManager.ts` |
> | `src/taskManager.ts` (新) | `TaskManager` 类：`submit(mdUri)` / `resume()` / `dispose()` | `extension.ts` |
> | `src/sidebarProvider.ts` | 新增 `toWebviewUri(localPath)` 方法 | `extension.ts`（init/taskStateUpdate 内调） |
> | `src/extension.ts` | `executeGenerate` 替换为 `taskManager.submit()`；`activate` 末尾调 `resume()` | — |
> | `media/sidebar.tsx` | App 新增 `tasks` 状态；TasksTab 改为实时任务卡片列表（进行中/已完成分区、进度条、缩略图） | `shared.ts` |
> 
> ### implementation closure
> 
> | 文件 | 核心改动 |
> |------|---------|
> | `src/taskManager.ts:1-260` | `submit()`: 解析 MD→建文件夹→建 N 个 `submitting` job→`fireSubmissions` 并发 POST `replyType:async`→全败删任务；`tick()`: 4s 定时器→`pollTask` 逐个轮询 running job→下载→标记终结→`finalizeTask` 通知+清理；`resume()`: 读持久化任务→submitting 无 id 判失败→重置超时；`persist()`: 写 `globalState('imageflow.tasks')` |
> | `src/extension.ts:1-165` | 创建 `TaskManager`→入 subscriptions→`resume()`；sidebar `generate`→`taskManager.submit()`；`pushTaskUpdate` 回调用 `sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri` 转换图片路径；`onTaskComplete` 按有成图/无成图弹窗或删除空文件夹 |
> | `src/api.ts:119` | `submitGenerate` 签名加 `replyType` 参数，透传给 `buildRequestBody` |
> | `media/sidebar.tsx` | `TaskCard` 组件：标题(文件夹+模型)、状态文本(提交中/生成中)、进度条、错误列表、缩略图网格；任务标签页分「进行中」和「已完成」两个分区 |
> | `media/sidebar.css` | 新增任务卡片样式：`.task-card`、`.task-card-progress-bar`、`.task-card-thumb` 等 |
> 
> ### test closure

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/.claude/skills/harness-dev
> 
> # {{PROJECT_NAME}}实现专才
> 
> ## 角色
> 
> 我是 {{PROJECT_NAME}} 的实现者。我的工作不是再决定“做什么”，而是把已经冻结的判断变成可运行代码，并把变更传播、测试闭环、生成物一致性一起收掉。
> 
> ## 核心张力
> 
> - **快修 vs 契约安全**
>   判断函数：如果改的是契约，先列消费方；如果只是实现，才允许局部收口。
> - **局部实现 vs 系统传播**
>   判断函数：任何共享 schema、事件、生成物、配置 key 都按契约处理。
> - **简洁 vs 静默降级**
>   判断函数：{{PROJECT_NAME}} 宁可大声报错，也不靠 silent fallback 维持“看起来能跑”。
> 
> ## 工作顺序
> 
> 1. 重新验证计划引用的文件、函数、schema 仍存在
> 2. 判断改的是 `contract` 还是 `implementation`
> 3. `grep` 消费方，不靠想象
> 4. 修改代码和测试
> 5. 追生成物、类型、文档是否需要同步
> 6. 跑指定验证，直到闭环
> 
> ## {{PROJECT_NAME}} 实现规则
> 
> - 共享 response model、事件 payload、工具定义、类型导出都是契约
> - generated artifact 变了，消费方也必须跟
> - 配置 key、环境变量、路由路径不是“内部细节”
> - 用户可见入口地址是产品契约：正式公网入口只允许 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` / `<NETWORK_REDACTED>`，不要把原始 IP 重新写回 README、默认值、前端 fallback 或分享链接
> - demo / admin 发布必须区分 `prod` 和 `preview`：构建基址、verify URL、远端目录都要跟 channel 对齐，不能混发
> - 改公网 edge 路由时，先改 `ops/nginx/*.conf`，再走 `bash scripts/deploy-edge.sh --yes`，不要只在线上手改 nginx
> - 不把必须参数做成 Optional 兜底
> - 不用 prompt 替代代码保障
> - **Runtime Fix ≠ Closure** — 症状消失不等于修好了。修了 bug 必须分析复发路径、确定防护机制（guard/test/type/convention）、关闭 `prevention_status`。只有 Level 2（复发路径关闭）才算 Fixed，Level 1（症状消失）只算 Runtime Fixed
> 
> ## 发布实现补充
> 
> 涉及部署脚本、nginx、demo 构建或公网地址时，默认补做这几件事：
> 
> 1. `grep` 代码 / 文档 / skill / README 中的旧入口，确认不会把 IP 当成用户入口继续传播
> 2. 同步 `prod` / `preview` 两个发布面，避免只修正式不修预发，或者反过来
> 3. 如果改了 demo 构建基址，重建产物并验证 `dist/index.html` 中的 base 路径
> 4. 如果改了公网入口，验证至少一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 和一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 路径可达
> 
> ## 来自 crystal-learn 的注入
> 
> **INV-1 波纹衰减**：改了源头不等于改完。行动：函数签名、schema、字段名、路由改动后，必须 `grep` 消费方。
> 
> **INV-5 语义搭便车**：表面一样不代表语义一样。行动：复用模式前先问“原来为什么这么写”“这里条件是否相同”“不同的话调什么”。
> 
> ## Output Contract
> 
> 每次实现任务结束，默认给：
> 
> 1. `change propagation checklist`
>    - 改了哪些契约
>    - 消费方都在哪里
>    - 哪些已同步
> 2. `implementation closure`
>    - 代码入口改了什么
>    - 是否引入新的 fallback / drift 风险
> 3. `test closure`
>    - 跑了哪些测试
>    - 哪些没跑、为什么
> 
> ## 不做什么
> 
> - 不替 `lead` 或 `arch` 补边界决策
> - 不复活 archived V1 skill 世界观
> - 不把“编译过了”当成数据链路已通
> 
>

> 2. **Manual asset library**: "+" button opens folder picker, recursive scan (depth ≤ 3, entries ≤ 500), dedup, stored in workspaceState. Each can be removed individually.
> 3. **Thumbnail behavior**: Left-click opens original image. Right-click inserts relative Markdown reference at cursor position in active MD.
> 4. **Insert rules**:
>    - Only insert if active editor IS the active MD (warn otherwise)
>    - Path: POSIX style relative to MD directory, `./` prefix if not `..`
>    - Path with spaces/parentheses: wrap with `<>`
>    - Cross-drive: warn and skip
>    - Alt text: filename without extension
> 5. **Image whitelist**: png/jpg/jpeg/gif/webp/bmp/svg — shared
> 6. **localResourceRoots**: must include all asset library directories

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 前后端共享消息协议与类型。
 * 前端 (media/sidebar.tsx) 与后端 (src/) 共用，单一源避免漂移。
 */

// ── 配置形状 ──────────────────────────────────────

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ── 任务数据 ──────────────────────────────────────

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface JobData {
  jobIndex: number;
  jobId?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  error?: string;
  progress: number;
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

export interface TaskData {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  taskDir: string;
  mdPath: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: JobData[];
  startedAt: number;       // 真实开始时间（持久化，重启不重置）
  sessionStartedAt: number; // 本次会话开始时间（重启重置，用于超时）
}

/** 推送给侧栏的任务摘要 */
export interface TaskSummary {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  totalJobs: number;
  doneJobs: number;
  failedJobs: number;
  submittingCount: number;
  runningCount: number;
  downloadedImages: string[]; // webview URI 化后的路径
  errors: string[];
  startedAt: number;
}

// ── 消息协议 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** Webview → Extension 消息 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; key: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' };

/** Extension → Webview 消息 */
export type ExtensionMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; activeMdPath: string | null; tasks: TaskSummary[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'activeMdChanged'; path: string | null }
  | { type: 'taskStateUpdate'; tasks: TaskSummary[] };

// ── 配置选项（供下拉菜单用） ────────────────────

export const BASE_URL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn', label: '国内节点' },
  { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com', label: '全球节点' },
];

export const MODEL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'nano-banana-2', label: 'nano-banana-2' },
  { value: 'nano-banana-pro', label: 'nano-banana-pro' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2', label: 'gpt-image-2' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2-vip', label: 'gpt-image-2-vip' },
];

export const ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1:1', label: '1:1' },
  { value: '3:4', label: '3:4' },
  { value: '4:3', label: '4:3' },
  { value: '16:9', label: '16:9' },
  { value: '9:16', label: '9:16' },
];

export const IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1K', label: '1K' },
  { value: '2K', label: '2K' },
  { value: '4K', label: '4K' },
];
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { TaskManager } from './taskManager';
import { WebviewMessage, TaskData, TaskSummary } from './shared';

// ── activate ──────────────────────────────────────

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ── 配置管理器 ──
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(
    context.secrets,
    context.globalState,
    context.workspaceState,
  );

  // ── 当前生效 MD ──
  let activeMdUri: vscode.Uri | null = getActiveMdUri();
  function getActiveMdUri(): vscode.Uri | null {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor) return null;
    return editor.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md') ? editor.document.uri : null;
  }

  // ── 任务完成回调 ──
  function onTaskComplete(task: TaskData, hasImages: boolean, errors: string[]): void {
    if (!hasImages) {
      // 无成图 → 删除空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try { fs.rmdirSync(task.taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      const unique = [...new Set(errors)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${unique.join('；')}`);
    } else if (errors.length > 0) {
      const unique = [...new Set(errors)];
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
        `部分生成失败（任务 ${task.folderName}）：${unique.join('；')}`,
      );
    } else {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
        `生成完成，图片已保存至 ${task.folderName}`,
      );
    }
  }

  // ── 任务更新回调 — 汇总为 TaskSummary 推给侧栏 ──
  function pushTaskUpdate(tasks: TaskData[]): void {
    const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
      doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
      runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
      downloadedImages: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages).map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
      errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
    }));
    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries });
  }

  // ── 侧栏提供器 ──
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await configManager.getAll();
        const activeMdPath = activeMdUri?.fsPath || null;
        const tasks = taskManager.getTasks();
        const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => ({
          taskId: t.taskId,
          folderName: t.folderName,
          model: t.model,
          totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
          doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
          failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
          submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
          runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
          downloadedImages: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages).map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
          errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
          startedAt: t.startedAt,
        }));
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'init', config, activeMdPath, tasks: summaries });
        break;
      }
      case 'setApiKey':
        await configManager.setApiKey(msg.key);
        break;
      case 'setConfig': {
        const updates = { ...msg.updates };
        if ('apiKey' in updates) {
          await configManager.setApiKey(updates.apiKey as string);
          delete updates.apiKey;
        }
        if (Object.keys(updates).length > 0) {
          await configManager.setConfig(updates);
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'generate':
        if (activeMdUri) {
          await taskManager.submit(activeMdUri);
        } else {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
        }
        break;
      case 'preview':
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
        break;
    }
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  // ── 任务管理器 ──
  const taskManager = new TaskManager(configManager, context.globalState, pushTaskUpdate, onTaskComplete);
  context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => taskManager.dispose() });

  // ── 重启续拉 ──
  taskManager.resume();

  // ── 生效 MD 跟随活动编辑器 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor((editor) => {
      if (!editor) return;
      const newPath = editor.document.uri.fsPath;
      if (newPath.endsWith('.md')) {
        activeMdUri = editor.document.uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: newPath });
      }
    }),
  );

  // ── 打开 API Key 获取页面 ──
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.openApiKeyPage', () => {
      vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse('https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys'));
    }),
  );

  // ── 生成图片命令 ──
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand(
    'image-flow.generateImage',
    async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      const mdUri = uri || activeMdUri;
      if (!mdUri) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件，或右键 .md 文件触发');
        return;
      }
      if (uri) {
        activeMdUri = uri;
        sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'activeMdChanged', path: uri.fsPath });
      }
      await taskManager.submit(mdUri);
    },
  );

  // ── 预览请求命令 ──
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // TaskManager 通过 subscriptions dispose 清理
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { WebviewMessage, ExtensionMessage } from './shared';

/** 生成随机 nonce 用于 CSP */
function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

/**
 * 侧栏 Webview 提供器。
 * 生成带 CSP 的 HTML，加载 React 前端，管理双向 postMessage 通信。
 */
export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly onMessage: (message: WebviewMessage) => void | Promise<void>,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    const nonce = getNonce();

    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
    };

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      this.onMessage(msg);
    });

    const jsUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    const cspSource = webview.cspSource;

    webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${cspSource} https:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${jsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }

  /** 向 Webview 发送消息 */
  postMessage(message: ExtensionMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(message);
  }

  /** 素材库增删后必须重设 localResourceRoots 以包含新路径 */
  updateLocalResourceRoots(): void {
    if (this._view) {
      this._view.webview.options = {
        ...this._view.webview.options,
        localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
      };
    }
  }

  /** 构建 localResourceRoots：media 目录 + 全部工作区根 */
  private buildLocalResourceRoots(): vscode.Uri[] {
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media'),
    ];
    const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
    if (workspaceFolders) {
      for (const folder of workspaceFolders) {
        roots.push(folder.uri);
      }
    }
    return roots;
  }

  /** 将本地文件路径转为 webview URI（供图片显示） */
  toWebviewUri(localPath: string): string {
    if (!this._view) return localPath;
    return this._view.webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(localPath)).toString();
  }
}

```

The task is to implement a VS Code extension called "image-flow" from scratch, following `agent-eval-spec.md` as the sole requirements input and `docs/grsai-api.md` as the API backend. The implementation follows 8 milestones (M1-M8) defined in spec §13. The user drives each milestone by invoking `/harness-dev` with the specific milestone description. All work is done autonomously ("全程不需要向我确认"). The user has completed M1 (scaffolding), M2 (sidebar + config), M3 (async tasks), and was about to start M4 (asset library).
> 
> 2. Key Technical Concepts:
>    - VS Code Extension (WebviewViewProvider, secrets, globalState, workspaceState, postMessage, asWebviewUri, CSP)
>    - TypeScript + esbuild dual-output build (dist/extension.js CJS, media/sidebar.js IIFE)
>    - React 19 + Radix UI (Tabs, Select, custom Stepper component)
>    - postMessage bidirectional communication protocol with shared types in `src/shared.ts`
>    - Grsai API: POST /v1/api/generate (replyType: json | async), GET /v1/api/result?id=
>    - Model-specific size field dispatch: nano-banana (aspectRatio + imageSize), gpt-image-2 (aspectRatio only), gpt-image-2-vip (pixel values from lookup table)
>    - Task lifecycle management: submitting → running → succeeded/failed/violation, single 4s timer with reentry lock
>    - globalState persistence and resume on activation with timeout reset per session
>    - Image whitelist: png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp, bmp, svg
>    - Markdown image parsing with `<>` bracket-wrapped paths supporting spaces and parentheses
>    - ConfigManager: secrets(apiKey) + globalState(patch merge) + workspaceState(asset lib)
>    - CSP with nonce, localResourceRoots management
>    - gpt-image-2-vip pixel size table: '1:1':{'1K':'1008x1008','2K':'1440x1440','4K':'2000x2000'}, etc.
> 
> 3. Files and Code Sections:

>        | { type: 'configUpdate'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }

>      ```

>    - `src/config.ts` (created M2)
>      - ConfigManager class: wraps vscode.SecretStorage, vscode.Memento(globalState), vscode.Memento(workspaceState)
>      - getAll() merges stored config with DEFAULT_CONFIG, reads apiKey from secrets
>      - setConfig(updates) does patch merge into globalState (always excludes apiKey)
>      - setApiKey() writes to secrets
> 
>    - `src/api.ts` (created M1, updated M3)
>      - Grsai API client. Key exports: Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize types, GenerateRequest, GenerateResponse interfaces
>      - `buildRequestBody(req, replyType)` - model-specific size field dispatch
>      - `submitGenerate(baseUrl, apiKey, req, replyType)` - POST /v1/api/generate, replyType defaults to 'json', M3 uses 'async'
>      - `pollResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId)` - GET /v1/api/result?id=
>      - `downloadImage(url, destPath)` - stream to file with transient error detection
>      - `isTransientError(statusCode)` - 5xx/429/0 → true
>      - `getMimeType(ext)` - extension to MIME mapping
>      - gpt-image-2-vip pixel size table: built with computed values
> 
>    - `src/parser.ts` (created M1)
>      - `parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir)` → { promptText, images, imageSummary }
>      - Regex: `/!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<[^>]*>|[^)]+)\)/g` for angle-bracket and plain paths
>      - Dedup by path, first-seen numbering, base64 data URI creation, missing file error aggregation
> 
>    - `src/sidebarProvider.ts` (created M1 placeholder, rewritten M2, updated M3)
>      - SidebarProvider class implements WebviewViewProvider
>      - Constructor takes extensionUri and onMessage callback
>      - resolveWebviewView: generates CSP with random nonce, loads sidebar.js and sidebar.css, sets localResourceRoots
>      - postMessage(message), updateLocalResourceRoots(), toWebviewUri(localPath)
>      - CSP: `default-src 'none'; style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${cspSource} https:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; font-src ${cspSource};`
> 
>    - `src/taskManager.ts` (created M3)
>      - TaskManager class: full async task lifecycle
>      - submit(mdUri): parse MD → create folder → N submitting jobs → persist → fireSubmissions (concurrent async POSTs) → all fail → remove task
>      - fireSubmissions: concurrent POST with replyType:'async', updates job status/id/error
>      - tick(): 4s timer, reentry lock, polls all running jobs
>      - pollTask(): pollResult for each running job, download succeeded images with sequential numbering, timeout check (10min from sessionStartedAt)
>      - resume(): read persisted tasks, mark submitting-without-id as failed, reset session timers
>      - persist(): write to globalState key 'imageflow.tasks'
>      - finalizeTask(): callback notification, remove from list
>      - Uses isTransientHttpMsg() helper to detect transient errors from error message text
> 
>    - `src/extension.ts` (created M1, rewritten M2, rewritten M3)
>      - activate(context): creates ConfigManager, SidebarProvider, TaskManager; wires message routing, active MD tracking, command registration, resume() on start
>      - Message handler routes: init → send config+tasks+activeMD; setApiKey → secrets; setConfig → patch globalState; generate → taskManager.submit(); preview → placeholder
>      - pushTaskUpdate callback: converts TaskData[] to TaskSummary[] with sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri for images
>      - onTaskComplete callback: deletes empty folders, shows error/warning/success notifications
>      - Registers image-flow.generateImage, image-flow.previewRequest, image-flow.openApiKeyPage commands

>    - **extension.ts any type errors**: 7 instances of `err: any` and type assertions `model as any`. Fixed by using `err: unknown` with `err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)` pattern and importing Model/AspectRatio/ImageSize types for proper assertions.
>    - **extension.ts unused getMimeType import**: Removed from imports.

> 
> 5. Problem Solving:
>    - Successfully designed a modular architecture with clear boundaries between extension host (all I/O) and webview (UI only).
>    - Implemented CSP nonce generation for webview script security.
>    - Solved the postMessage protocol drift problem by centralizing all message types in shared.ts, imported by both extension and webview code (shared.ts included in webview tsconfig).
>    - Config storage layered correctly: secrets(apiKey) + globalState(patch merge for other config) + workspaceState(asset lib).
>    - Task lifecycle with proper reentry lock solved the "download takes longer than poll interval" race condition.
>    - Timeout reset per session solved the "offline tasks get mis-timed-out" problem from spec §7.4.
>    - gpt-image-2-vip pixel size conversion table computed manually with constraints: multiples of 16, matching aspect ratios, within 655,360-8,294,400 pixel range.
>    - Dedup logic in parser correctly handles same-image-referenced-multiple-times with first-seen numbering.
>    - All builds pass: `npm run check-types` (dual tsc), `npm run lint` (ESLint), `npm run compile` (esbuild).

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 前后端共享消息协议与类型。
 * 前端 (media/sidebar.tsx) 与后端 (src/) 共用，单一源避免漂移。
 */

// ── 配置形状 ──────────────────────────────────────

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ── 任务数据 ──────────────────────────────────────

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface JobData {
  jobIndex: number;
  jobId?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  error?: string;
  progress: number;
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

export interface TaskData {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  taskDir: string;
  mdPath: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: JobData[];
  startedAt: number;       // 真实开始时间（持久化，重启不重置）
  sessionStartedAt: number; // 本次会话开始时间（重启重置，用于超时）
}

/** 推送给侧栏的任务摘要 */
export interface TaskSummary {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  totalJobs: number;
  doneJobs: number;
  failedJobs: number;
  submittingCount: number;
  runningCount: number;
  downloadedImages: string[]; // webview URI 化后的路径
  errors: string[];
  startedAt: number;
}

// ── 消息协议 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** Webview → Extension 消息 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; key: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' };

/** Extension → Webview 消息 */
export type ExtensionMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; activeMdPath: string | null; tasks: TaskSummary[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'activeMdChanged'; path: string | null }
  | { type: 'taskStateUpdate'; tasks: TaskSummary[] };

// ── 配置选项（供下拉菜单用） ────────────────────

export const BASE_URL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn', label: '国内节点' },
  { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com', label: '全球节点' },
];

export const MODEL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'nano-banana-2', label: 'nano-banana-2' },
  { value: 'nano-banana-pro', label: 'nano-banana-pro' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2', label: 'gpt-image-2' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2-vip', label: 'gpt-image-2-vip' },
];

export const ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1:1', label: '1:1' },
  { value: '3:4', label: '3:4' },
  { value: '4:3', label: '4:3' },
  { value: '16:9', label: '16:9' },
  { value: '9:16', label: '9:16' },
];

export const IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1K', label: '1K' },
  { value: '2K', label: '2K' },
  { value: '4K', label: '4K' },
];
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { WebviewMessage, ExtensionMessage } from './shared';

/** 生成随机 nonce 用于 CSP */
function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

/**
 * 侧栏 Webview 提供器。
 * 生成带 CSP 的 HTML，加载 React 前端，管理双向 postMessage 通信。
 */
export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly onMessage: (message: WebviewMessage) => void | Promise<void>,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    const nonce = getNonce();

    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
    };

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      this.onMessage(msg);
    });

    const jsUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    const cspSource = webview.cspSource;

    webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline'; img-src ${cspSource} https:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${jsUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }

  /** 向 Webview 发送消息 */
  postMessage(message: ExtensionMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(message);
  }

  /** 素材库增删后必须重设 localResourceRoots 以包含新路径 */
  updateLocalResourceRoots(): void {
    if (this._view) {
      this._view.webview.options = {
        ...this._view.webview.options,
        localResourceRoots: this.buildLocalResourceRoots(),
      };
    }
  }

  /** 构建 localResourceRoots：media 目录 + 全部工作区根 */
  private buildLocalResourceRoots(): vscode.Uri[] {
    const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media'),
    ];
    const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
    if (workspaceFolders) {
      for (const folder of workspaceFolders) {
        roots.push(folder.uri);
      }
    }
    return roots;
  }

  /** 将本地文件路径转为 webview URI（供图片显示） */
  toWebviewUri(localPath: string): string {
    if (!this._view) return localPath;
    return this._view.webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(localPath)).toString();
  }
}

```
</details>
