<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/preview.ts</code></summary>

````typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { buildRequestBody, Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize } from './api';
import { AppConfig } from './shared';
import { assembleFinalPrompt } from './config';

/**
 * 对目标 MD 走与真实提交完全一致的解析与请求体构造，但不调 API。
 * 输出四段临时预览文档（untitled, language: markdown）。
 */
export async function generatePreview(mdPath: string, config: AppConfig): Promise<void> {
  const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');

  // 1. 解析（与真实提交共用 parser）
  let parseResult;
  try {
    parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, path.dirname(mdPath));
  } catch (err: unknown) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
    return;
  }

  // 2. 组装最终提示词（注入句 + IMAGES.md + 正文）
  const wsRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;
  const finalPrompt = assembleFinalPrompt(parseResult.promptText, config.model, config.modelInjections, wsRoot);

  // 3. 构造请求体（与真实提交共用 buildRequestBody，replyType 取 async 形式）
  const requestBody = buildRequestBody(
    {
      model: config.model as Model,
      prompt: finalPrompt,
      images: parseResult.images,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio as AspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize as ImageSize,
    },
    'async',
  );

  // 3. 剔除 prompt/images 后的请求参数
  const paramsForDisplay = { ...requestBody };
  delete paramsForDisplay.prompt;
  delete paramsForDisplay.images;

  // 4. 拼装四段预览文档
  const lines = [
    '# 预览请求',
    '',
    '## 最终提示词',
    '',
    '```',
    finalPrompt,
    '```',
    '',
    '## 请求地址',
    '',
    `\`POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate\``,
    '',
    '## 请求参数',
    '',
    '```json',
    JSON.stringify(paramsForDisplay, null, 2),
    '```',
    '',
    '## 参考图概览',
    '',
    parseResult.imageSummary,
  ];

  // 5. 打开为临时文档
  const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
    content: lines.join('\n'),
    language: 'markdown',
  });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc);
}

````
</details>

<details>

```typescript
// ── 设置标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function SettingsTab({
  config,
  onUpdateConfig,
  onSetApiKey,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
  onSetApiKey: (key: string) => void;
}) {
  const openApiKeyPage = () => {
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = 'command:image-flow.openApiKeyPage';
    a.click();
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <div className="password-row">
            <input
              className="text-input"
              type="password"
              value={config.apiKey}
              placeholder="输入 API Key (sk-…)"
              onChange={(e) => {
                onSetApiKey(e.target.value);
                onUpdateConfig({ apiKey: e.target.value });
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>
        <button className="inline-link" onClick={openApiKeyPage}>获取 API Key →</button>
      </div>

      <div className="form-row">
        <div className="form-label">API 节点</div>
        <SelectField value={config.baseUrl} options={BASE_URL_OPTIONS} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ baseUrl: v })} />
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">缩略图</div>
        <Stepper label="工作台每行张数" value={config.workbenchCols} min={1} max={8} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ workbenchCols: v })} />
        <div style={{ height: 8 }} />
        <Stepper label="任务栏每行张数" value={config.tasksCols} min={1} max={8} onChange={(v) => onUpdateConfig({ tasksCols: v })} />
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="settings-section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="placeholder-text">模型注入提示词编辑将在 M6 实现</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 通用组件 ──────────────────────────────────────

```
</details>

> ## M6 提示词注入 — 实现闭合
> 
> ### 变更传播清单
> 
> | 契约 | 消费方 | 状态 |
> |------|--------|------|
> | `assembleFinalPrompt()` 函数导出 | `config.ts` → `taskManager.ts`, `preview.ts` | ✅ 两处调用 |
> | `seedModelInjections()` 方法 | `config.ts` → `extension.ts:activate` | ✅ 侧栏注册前调用 |
> | `modelInjections` 字段（AppConfig 已有） | `shared.ts` → `config.ts`, `taskManager.ts`, `preview.ts`, `sidebar.tsx` | ✅ 无 schema 变更 |
> | `activate()` 签名改为 async | `extension.ts` → VS Code runtime | ✅ VS Code 原生支持 |
> | SettingsTab 新增 `injectionModel` state | `sidebar.tsx` 内部 | ✅ 纯 UI 状态 |
> 
> ### 实现闭合
> 
> - **种入逻辑**: `seedModelInjections()` 检查 `in` 操作符（非真值检查），用户清空为空串的键不会被覆盖
> - **提示词组装**: `assembleFinalPrompt()` 三段拼接（注入句 / IMAGES.md / 正文），`\n\n` 连接，空段省略，IMAGES.md 静默跳过
> - **提交路径**: `taskManager.submit()` 调 `assembleFinalPrompt` → `fireSubmissions` 用最终提示词
> - **预览路径**: `preview.generatePreview()` 调 `assembleFinalPrompt` → 请求体构造与预览文档均用最终提示词
> - **无新 fallback / drift 风险**: `assembleFinalPrompt` 纯函数，无副作用，输入明确
> 
> ### 构建验证
> 
> | 检查 | 结果 |
> |------|------|
> | `check-types` (双 tsc) | ✅ 通过 |
> | `lint` (eslint) | ✅ 0 errors |
> | `compile` (esbuild) | ✅ 构建成功 |
>

> 
> - 未加单元测试（M8 补齐），逻辑已验证但非自动化回归
> - IMAGES.md 路径硬编码 `path.join(workspaceRoot, 'IMAGES.md')`，不支持工作区根以外的位置

## 🛠️ Harness Toolkit Reminder (每 ~3 小时主动告知)

下面 5 个入口在 v5 hooks 之外，需要主动跑（v5 hooks 自身是 transparent 的，用户不用管）。
如果你（main agent）发现下面任一项有未读/未处理内容，请主动告知用户：

### 1. trace-analyzer 提议（SessionEnd 自动跑，但 propose 不自动落地）
```
ls -lt .towow/proposals/ | head -5
```
如果有 confidence ≥ 0.8 的 finding，建议建 issue (`docs/issues/...`) 跟踪。

### 2. 重建 magic doc（source 改了之后）
```
python3 scripts/checks/regenerate_magic_docs.py all          # 重建
python3 scripts/checks/regenerate_magic_docs.py all --check  # 只检查漂移
```

### 3. 全量文档漂移检测
```
python3 scripts/checks/check_doc_freshness.py
```

### 4. 调 D9 mid-task recitation 频率（默认 50 tool calls）
```
export TOWOW_RECITATION_EVERY=30   # 更频繁
export TOWOW_RECITATION_EVERY=100  # 更稀疏
```

### 5. 累计 metrics（v5 hooks 的实际效果数据）
```
cat .towow/metrics/tool-call-counter.txt        # 总 tool 调用数
wc -l .towow/metrics/guard-events.jsonl         # guard 触发次数
wc -l .towow/metrics/stop-events.jsonl          # stop check 次数
wc -l .towow/metrics/tool-failures.jsonl        # tool 失败次数
wc -l .towow/metrics/initializer-events.jsonl   # WP init 次数
ls .towow/proposals/                            # trace-analyzer 提议数
```

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/.claude/skills/harness-dev
> 
> # {{PROJECT_NAME}}实现专才
> 
> ## 角色
> 
> 我是 {{PROJECT_NAME}} 的实现者。我的工作不是再决定“做什么”，而是把已经冻结的判断变成可运行代码，并把变更传播、测试闭环、生成物一致性一起收掉。
> 
> ## 核心张力
> 
> - **快修 vs 契约安全**
>   判断函数：如果改的是契约，先列消费方；如果只是实现，才允许局部收口。
> - **局部实现 vs 系统传播**
>   判断函数：任何共享 schema、事件、生成物、配置 key 都按契约处理。
> - **简洁 vs 静默降级**
>   判断函数：{{PROJECT_NAME}} 宁可大声报错，也不靠 silent fallback 维持“看起来能跑”。
> 
> ## 工作顺序
> 
> 1. 重新验证计划引用的文件、函数、schema 仍存在
> 2. 判断改的是 `contract` 还是 `implementation`
> 3. `grep` 消费方，不靠想象
> 4. 修改代码和测试
> 5. 追生成物、类型、文档是否需要同步
> 6. 跑指定验证，直到闭环
> 
> ## {{PROJECT_NAME}} 实现规则
> 
> - 共享 response model、事件 payload、工具定义、类型导出都是契约
> - generated artifact 变了，消费方也必须跟
> - 配置 key、环境变量、路由路径不是“内部细节”
> - 用户可见入口地址是产品契约：正式公网入口只允许 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` / `<NETWORK_REDACTED>`，不要把原始 IP 重新写回 README、默认值、前端 fallback 或分享链接
> - demo / admin 发布必须区分 `prod` 和 `preview`：构建基址、verify URL、远端目录都要跟 channel 对齐，不能混发
> - 改公网 edge 路由时，先改 `ops/nginx/*.conf`，再走 `bash scripts/deploy-edge.sh --yes`，不要只在线上手改 nginx
> - 不把必须参数做成 Optional 兜底
> - 不用 prompt 替代代码保障
> - **Runtime Fix ≠ Closure** — 症状消失不等于修好了。修了 bug 必须分析复发路径、确定防护机制（guard/test/type/convention）、关闭 `prevention_status`。只有 Level 2（复发路径关闭）才算 Fixed，Level 1（症状消失）只算 Runtime Fixed
> 
> ## 发布实现补充
> 
> 涉及部署脚本、nginx、demo 构建或公网地址时，默认补做这几件事：
> 
> 1. `grep` 代码 / 文档 / skill / README 中的旧入口，确认不会把 IP 当成用户入口继续传播
> 2. 同步 `prod` / `preview` 两个发布面，避免只修正式不修预发，或者反过来
> 3. 如果改了 demo 构建基址，重建产物并验证 `dist/index.html` 中的 base 路径
> 4. 如果改了公网入口，验证至少一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 和一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 路径可达
> 
> ## 来自 crystal-learn 的注入
> 
> **INV-1 波纹衰减**：改了源头不等于改完。行动：函数签名、schema、字段名、路由改动后，必须 `grep` 消费方。
> 
> **INV-5 语义搭便车**：表面一样不代表语义一样。行动：复用模式前先问“原来为什么这么写”“这里条件是否相同”“不同的话调什么”。
> 
> ## Output Contract
> 
> 每次实现任务结束，默认给：
> 
> 1. `change propagation checklist`
>    - 改了哪些契约
>    - 消费方都在哪里
>    - 哪些已同步
> 2. `implementation closure`
>    - 代码入口改了什么
>    - 是否引入新的 fallback / drift 风险
> 3. `test closure`
>    - 跑了哪些测试
>    - 哪些没跑、为什么
> 
> ## 不做什么
> 
> - 不替 `lead` 或 `arch` 补边界决策
> - 不复活 archived V1 skill 世界观
> - 不把“编译过了”当成数据链路已通
> 
> 
> ARGUMENTS: 按计划实施 M7（体验打磨）：后台提交（点生成立即建卡不等网络）、进行中卡片进度条与逐秒计时、生效 MD 跟随活动编辑器（非 MD 标签不清空）、任务/历史合并倒序列表。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。

- 上部：素材库区（§10）。
- 底部停靠区：
  - 一行四个控件：模型 / 分辨率 / 比例 下拉 + 并发数步进器（1~10）。
  - 生成行：显示当前生效 MD 文件名（无则「未打开 Markdown 文件」）+「预览请求」按钮 +「生成」按钮（提交期间禁用并显示「生成中…」）。
  - 状态行：显示最近一次状态/错误消息（错误红色）。

### 8.4 任务页

- 进行中任务与历史任务**合并为一条按文件夹名（含时间戳）倒序的列表**，新任务在前。
- 进行中卡片（默认展开，可折叠）：标题 = `文件夹名（模型） · 提交中 x/N 或 生成中 done/N · [失败 n ·] 已进行时长`；展开后显示——
  - 聚合进度条 + 百分比：每个 job 占 1/N，终结 job 记满分、running 取远端进度、submitting 记 0，取整均摊；
  - 已下载图片的缩略图（随 job 完成实时增加）；
  - 「正在提交 n 个请求…」「还有 n 张正在生成…」提示与错误列表。
  - 已进行时长每秒自增，格式 `mm:ss`（超 1 小时 `h:mm:ss`），基于真实提交时间。
- 历史卡片（默认收起）：标题 = `文件夹名（n 张）`，展开显示缩略图。
- 历史来源：扫描生效 MD 同级目录的全部 `task-*` 文件夹内图片，倒序；**排除进行中任务的文件夹**避免与进行中卡片重复；无图片的文件夹不列出。
- 缩略图点击用 VS Code 打开原图。每行张数由 `tasksCols` 控制。
- 任务完成的瞬间不得闪烁：先把完成图并入历史，再移除进行中卡片。

### 8.5 设置页

- API Key 密码输入框 + 「获取 API Key →」链接（`https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys`，经扩展用系统浏览器打开）。
- 节点下拉（国内/全球）。
- 工作台每行张数、任务栏每行张数两个步进器。
- 模型注入提示词编辑：一个模型下拉（默认当前工作台模型，独立选择不影响工作台）+ 对应模型注入句的多行文本框。

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/media/sidebar.tsx</code></summary>

```typescript
// ── 任务标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function isTaskDone(t: TaskSummary): boolean {
  return t.submittingCount === 0 && t.runningCount === 0;
}

function formatStartedAt(ts: number): string {
  const d = new Date(ts);
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}:${pad(d.getSeconds())}`;
}

function TasksTab({ tasks }: { tasks: TaskSummary[] }) {
  if (tasks.length === 0) {
    return <div className="placeholder-text">暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中点击「生成」开始。</div>;
  }

  const active = tasks.filter(t => !isTaskDone(t));
  const done = tasks.filter(t => isTaskDone(t));

  return (
    <div>
      {active.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-section">
          <div className="task-section-title">进行中 ({active.length})</div>
          {active.map(t => (
            <TaskCard key={t.taskId} task={t} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {done.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-section">
          <div className="task-section-title">已完成 ({done.length})</div>
          {done.map(t => (
            <TaskCard key={t.taskId} task={t} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function TaskCard({ task: t }: { task: TaskSummary }) {
  const done = isTaskDone(t);
  const statusText = done
    ? `${t.doneJobs}/${t.totalJobs} 张`
    : t.submittingCount > 0
      ? `提交中 ${t.doneJobs + t.failedJobs}/${t.totalJobs}`
      : `生成中 ${t.doneJobs}/${t.totalJobs}${t.failedJobs > 0 ? ` · 失败 ${t.failedJobs}` : ''}`;

  // 聚合进度: 每个job占 1/N, 终结=100, running取进度, submitting=0
  const progress = done
    ? 100
    : t.totalJobs > 0
      ? t.doneJobs * 100 / t.totalJobs
      : 0;

  return (
    <div className={`task-card ${done ? 'task-card-done' : ''}`}>
      <div className="task-card-header">
        <span className="task-card-folder">{t.folderName}</span>
        <span className="task-card-model">({t.model})</span>
      </div>
      <div className="task-card-status">{statusText}</div>
      <div className="task-card-progress-bar">
        <div className="task-card-progress-fill" style={{ width: `${Math.round(progress)}%` }} />
      </div>
      {!done && (
        <div className="task-card-subtitle">
          {t.submittingCount > 0 && `正在提交 ${t.submittingCount} 个请求…`}
          {t.runningCount > 0 && `还有 ${t.runningCount} 张正在生成…`}
        </div>
      )}
      {t.errors.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-card-errors">
          {t.errors.map((e, i) => <div key={i} className="task-card-error">{e}</div>)}
        </div>
      )}
      {t.downloadedImages.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-card-images">
          {t.downloadedImages.map((uri, i) => (
            <img key={i} src={uri} className="task-card-thumb" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 设置标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function SettingsTab({
  config,
  onUpdateConfig,
```

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now I understand the current state. Let me read the TaskSummary type to see what fields are available for progress.
> 
> Current state analysis:
> 1. **后台提交** ✅ Already done — notify() and persist() called before fireSubmissions()
> 2. **进度条** ⚠️ Partially done — uses simplified doneJobs/totalJobs, doesn't use per-job progress from API
> 3. **逐秒计时** ❌ Not done — has formatStartedAt but no running timer
> 4. **MD 跟随** ✅ Already done — onDidChangeActiveTextEditor only updates .md, non-.md doesn't clear
> 5. **合并倒序列表** ❌ Not done — currently split into active/done sections
> 6. **历史来源扫描** ❌ Not done — spec says history should scan task-* folders on disk, not just from in-memory tasks
> 
> Let me check what needs to change:
> 
> ### TaskSummary needs new fields for M7:
> - `progress`: per-job aggregated progress (not just doneJobs/totalJobs — needs running job progress)
> - Need timing info for the running timer (startedAt already exists)
> 
> Actually, looking at the CURRENT implementation:
> - `TaskSummary` has: `doneJobs`, `failedJobs`, `submittingCount`, `runningCount`, `downloadedImages`, `errors`, `startedAt`
> - The progress bar currently uses `doneJobs / totalJobs * 100` → simplified, doesn't account for running job progress
> 
> The spec says: "聚合进度条 + 百分比：每个 job 占 1/N，终结 job 记满分、running 取远端进度、submitting 记 0，取整均摊"
> - This means progress = sum(job progress values) / N
> - succeeded/failed/violation jobs = 100
> - submitting jobs = 0
> - running jobs = actual progress from API (0-100)
> 
> Current implementation doesn't track per-job progress in TaskSummary. I need to add progress aggregation.
> 
> ### What I need to do:
> 
> 1. **TaskSummary**: Add aggregated `progress` field that accounts for running job progress
> 2. **TaskCard**: 
>    - Use the actual aggregated progress for the progress bar
>    - Add running elapsed timer (useState + setInterval)
>    - Show elapsed time formatted as mm:ss (or h:mm:ss if > 1h)
> 3. **TasksTab**: 
>    - Merge active + done into single list sorted by startedAt descending
>    - Remove separate "进行中" / "已完成" sections
>    - Active cards default expanded, done cards default collapsed

>    - Scan task-* folders in MD directory when active MD changes

> }

> Yes — `fireSubmissions` is called without `await`, so it runs in the background. The card is created immediately, and then the submissions happen asynchronously. This is correct "后台提交" behavior. ✅

> But wait, if `fireSubmissions` throws an error, who catches it? Since it's not awaited, the error would be an unhandled promise rejection. Let me check... Actually, looking at fireSubmissions, it catches errors per-job and sets job.error. And the Promise.all will resolve even if individual submissions fail. The only errors that escape are from the Promise.all itself (which shouldn't happen since each submitOne catches its own errors). So this is fine.

> job.progress = result.progress || 0;

> 
> So `job.progress` is a value 0-100 (or 0 on default). When computing aggregated progress, I use:
> - succeeded/failed/violation → 100
> - running → job.progress (0-100)
> - submitting → 0

> One more thing about the elapsed timer: the spec says "已进行时长每秒自增，格式 mm:ss（超 1 小时 h:mm:ss），基于真实提交时间". In the frontend, I can use:
> ```tsx
> const [elapsed, setElapsed] = useState(0);
> useEffect(() => {
>   if (!done) {
>     setElapsed(Math.floor((Date.now() - t.startedAt) / 1000));
>     const timer = setInterval(() => {
>       setElapsed(Math.floor((Date.now() - t.startedAt) / 1000));
>     }, 1000);
>     return () => clearInterval(timer);
>   }
> }, [done, t.startedAt]);
> ```
> 
> For formatting:
> ```tsx
> function formatElapsed(seconds: number): string {
>   const h = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
>   const m = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
>   const s = seconds % 60;
>   if (h > 0) return `${h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
>   return `${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
> }
> ```
>

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/shared.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 前后端共享消息协议与类型。
 * 前端 (media/sidebar.tsx) 与后端 (src/) 共用，单一源避免漂移。
 */

// ── 配置形状 ──────────────────────────────────────

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ── 任务数据 ──────────────────────────────────────

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface JobData {
  jobIndex: number;
  jobId?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  error?: string;
  progress: number;
  downloadedImages: string[];
}

export interface TaskData {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  taskDir: string;
  mdPath: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: JobData[];
  startedAt: number;       // 真实开始时间（持久化，重启不重置）
  sessionStartedAt: number; // 本次会话开始时间（重启重置，用于超时）
}

/** 推送给侧栏的任务摘要 */
export interface TaskSummary {
  taskId: string;
  folderName: string;
  model: string;
  totalJobs: number;
  doneJobs: number;
  failedJobs: number;
  submittingCount: number;
  runningCount: number;
  downloadedImages: string[]; // webview URI 化后的路径
  errors: string[];
  startedAt: number;
}

// ── 消息协议 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** Webview → Extension 消息 */
export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; key: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'addAssetLib' }
  | { type: 'removeAssetLib'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; imagePath: string };

// ── 素材库 ──────────────────────────────────────

export interface FileItem {
  name: string;       // 文件名
  path: string;       // 绝对路径
  webviewUri: string; // webview 可用的 URI
}

export interface AssetLib {
  name: string;    // 展示名
  path: string;    // 目录绝对路径
  files: FileItem[];
  manual: boolean;
}

/** Extension → Webview 消息 */
export type ExtensionMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; activeMdPath: string | null; tasks: TaskSummary[]; autoLibs: AssetLib[]; manualLibs: AssetLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; updates: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'activeMdChanged'; path: string | null }
  | { type: 'taskStateUpdate'; tasks: TaskSummary[] }
  | { type: 'assetLibUpdate'; autoLibs: AssetLib[]; manualLibs: AssetLib[] };

// ── 配置选项（供下拉菜单用） ────────────────────

export const BASE_URL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn', label: '国内节点' },
  { value: 'https://grsaiapi.com', label: '全球节点' },
];

export const MODEL_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'nano-banana-2', label: 'nano-banana-2' },
  { value: 'nano-banana-pro', label: 'nano-banana-pro' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2', label: 'gpt-image-2' },
  { value: 'gpt-image-2-vip', label: 'gpt-image-2-vip' },
];

export const ASPECT_RATIO_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1:1', label: '1:1' },
  { value: '3:4', label: '3:4' },
  { value: '4:3', label: '4:3' },
  { value: '16:9', label: '16:9' },
  { value: '9:16', label: '9:16' },
];

export const IMAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '1K', label: '1K' },
  { value: '2K', label: '2K' },
  { value: '4K', label: '4K' },
];

```
</details>

  // ── 任务更新回调 — 汇总为 TaskSummary 推给侧栏 ──
  function pushTaskUpdate(tasks: TaskData[]): void {
    const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => ({
      taskId: t.taskId,
      folderName: t.folderName,
      model: t.model,
      totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
      doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
      failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
      submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
      runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
      downloadedImages: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages).map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
      errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
      startedAt: t.startedAt,
    }));
    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries });
  }

  // ── 素材库刷新 ──
  function buildAssetLibs(mdPath: string | null): { autoLibs: AssetLib[]; manualLibs: AssetLib[] } {
    const toLib = (name: string, dirPath: string, files: { name: string; path: string }[], manual: boolean): AssetLib => ({
      name,
      path: dirPath,
      files: files.map(f => ({ ...f, webviewUri: sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(f.path) })),
      manual,
    });

    const autoLibs = mdPath
      ? scanAutoLibs(mdPath).map(l => toLib(l.name, l.path, l.files, false))
      : [];

    const manualPaths: string[] = context.workspaceState.get(MANUAL_LIBS_KEY) || [];
    const manualLibs = manualPaths.map(p => {
      const files = scanManualLib(p);
      return toLib(path.basename(p), p, files, true);
    });

    return { autoLibs, manualLibs };
  }

  function pushAssetLibUpdate(): void {
    const { autoLibs, manualLibs } = buildAssetLibs(activeMdUri?.fsPath || null);
    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'assetLibUpdate', autoLibs, manualLibs });
    const manualPaths: string[] = context.workspaceState.get(MANUAL_LIBS_KEY) || [];
    sidebarProvider.updateLocalResourceRoots(manualPaths);
```

```diff
@@ -1,17 +1,69 @@   // ── 任务更新回调 — 汇总为 TaskSummary 推给侧栏 ──
-  function pushTaskUpdate(tasks: TaskData[]): void {
-    const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => ({
-      taskId: t.taskId,
-      folderName: t.folderName,
-      model: t.model,
-      totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
-      doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
-      failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
-      submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
-      runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
-      downloadedImages: t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages).map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
-      errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
-      startedAt: t.startedAt,
-    }));
-    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries });
+  function pushFullTaskUpdate(taskList?: TaskData[]): void {
+    const tasks = taskList || taskManager.getTasks();
+    const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => {
+      const images = t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages);
+      // 聚合进度：每个 job 占 1/N，终结=100，running 取远端进度，submitting=0
+      const aggProgress = t.jobs.length > 0
+        ? t.jobs.reduce((sum, j) => {
+            if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') return sum + 100;
+            if (j.status === 'running') return sum + j.progress;
+            return sum; // submitting = 0
+          }, 0) / t.jobs.length
+        : 0;
+      return {
+        taskId: t.taskId,
+        folderName: t.folderName,
+        model: t.model,
+        totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
+        doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
+        failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
+        submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
+        runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
+        downloadedImages: images.map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
+        imagePaths: images,
+        errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
+        startedAt: t.startedAt,
+        progress: Math.round(aggProgress),
+      };
+    });
+
+    const history = activeMdUri ? scanHistory(activeMdUri.fsPath, new Set(tasks.map(t => t.taskDir))) : [];
+    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries, history });
   }
+
+  // ── 历史扫描 ──
+  function scanHistory(mdPath: string, activeTaskDirs: Set<string>): HistoryItem[] {
+    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
+    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
+    try {
+      entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });
+    } catch {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    const items: HistoryItem[] = [];
+    for (const e of entries) {
+      if (!e.isDirectory() || !e.name.startsWith('task-')) continue;
+      const taskDir = path.join(mdDir, e.name);
+      if (activeTaskDirs.has(taskDir)) continue;
+
+      let files: string[];
+      try {
+        files = fs.readdirSync(taskDir).filter(f => isImageFile(f)).sort();
+      } catch {
+        continue;
+      }
+      if (files.length === 0) continue;
+
+      items.push({
+        folderName: e.name,
+        taskDir,
+        images: files.map(f => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(path.join(taskDir, f))),
+        imagePaths: files.map(f => path.join(taskDir, f)),
+      });
+    }
+
+    items.sort((a, b) => b.folderName.localeCompare(a.folderName));
+    return items;
+  }

  // ── 任务更新回调 — 汇总为 TaskSummary 推给侧栏 ──
  function pushFullTaskUpdate(taskList?: TaskData[]): void {
    const tasks = taskList || taskManager.getTasks();
    const summaries: TaskSummary[] = tasks.map(t => {
      const images = t.jobs.flatMap(j => j.downloadedImages);
      // 聚合进度：每个 job 占 1/N，终结=100，running 取远端进度，submitting=0
      const aggProgress = t.jobs.length > 0
        ? t.jobs.reduce((sum, j) => {
            if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') return sum + 100;
            if (j.status === 'running') return sum + j.progress;
            return sum; // submitting = 0
          }, 0) / t.jobs.length
        : 0;
      return {
        taskId: t.taskId,
        folderName: t.folderName,
        model: t.model,
        totalJobs: t.jobs.length,
        doneJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length,
        failedJobs: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length,
        submittingCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length,
        runningCount: t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length,
        downloadedImages: images.map(p => sidebarProvider.toWebviewUri(p)),
        imagePaths: images,
        errors: t.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!),
        startedAt: t.startedAt,
        progress: Math.round(aggProgress),
      };
    });

    const history = activeMdUri ? scanHistory(activeMdUri.fsPath, new Set(tasks.map(t => t.taskDir))) : [];
    sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries, history });
  }

  // ── 历史扫描 ──
  function scanHistory(mdPath: string, activeTaskDirs: Set<string>): HistoryItem[] {
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      return [];
    }

    const items: HistoryItem[] = [];
```

<details>

```typescript
// ── 任务标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function isTaskDone(t: TaskSummary): boolean {
  return t.submittingCount === 0 && t.runningCount === 0;
}

function formatStartedAt(ts: number): string {
  const d = new Date(ts);
  const pad = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}:${pad(d.getSeconds())}`;
}

function TasksTab({ tasks }: { tasks: TaskSummary[] }) {
  if (tasks.length === 0) {
    return <div className="placeholder-text">暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中点击「生成」开始。</div>;
  }

  const active = tasks.filter(t => !isTaskDone(t));
  const done = tasks.filter(t => isTaskDone(t));

  return (
    <div>
      {active.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-section">
          <div className="task-section-title">进行中 ({active.length})</div>
          {active.map(t => (
            <TaskCard key={t.taskId} task={t} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {done.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-section">
          <div className="task-section-title">已完成 ({done.length})</div>
          {done.map(t => (
            <TaskCard key={t.taskId} task={t} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function TaskCard({ task: t }: { task: TaskSummary }) {
  const done = isTaskDone(t);
  const statusText = done
    ? `${t.doneJobs}/${t.totalJobs} 张`
    : t.submittingCount > 0
      ? `提交中 ${t.doneJobs + t.failedJobs}/${t.totalJobs}`
      : `生成中 ${t.doneJobs}/${t.totalJobs}${t.failedJobs > 0 ? ` · 失败 ${t.failedJobs}` : ''}`;

  // 聚合进度: 每个job占 1/N, 终结=100, running取进度, submitting=0
  const progress = done
    ? 100
    : t.totalJobs > 0
      ? t.doneJobs * 100 / t.totalJobs
      : 0;

  return (
    <div className={`task-card ${done ? 'task-card-done' : ''}`}>
      <div className="task-card-header">
        <span className="task-card-folder">{t.folderName}</span>
        <span className="task-card-model">({t.model})</span>
      </div>
      <div className="task-card-status">{statusText}</div>
      <div className="task-card-progress-bar">
        <div className="task-card-progress-fill" style={{ width: `${Math.round(progress)}%` }} />
      </div>
      {!done && (
        <div className="task-card-subtitle">
          {t.submittingCount > 0 && `正在提交 ${t.submittingCount} 个请求…`}
          {t.runningCount > 0 && `还有 ${t.runningCount} 张正在生成…`}
        </div>
      )}
      {t.errors.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-card-errors">
          {t.errors.map((e, i) => <div key={i} className="task-card-error">{e}</div>)}
        </div>
      )}
      {t.downloadedImages.length > 0 && (
        <div className="task-card-images">
          {t.downloadedImages.map((uri, i) => (
            <img key={i} src={uri} className="task-card-thumb" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── 设置标签页 ────────────────────────────────────

function SettingsTab({
  config,
  onUpdateConfig,
  onSetApiKey,
}: {
  config: AppConfig;
  onUpdateConfig: (updates: Partial<AppConfig>) => void;
  onSetApiKey: (key: string) => void;
```
</details>

+function formatElapsed(seconds: number): string {
+  const h = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
+  const m = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
+  const s = seconds % 60;
+  if (h > 0) return `${h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
+  return `${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
 }
 
-function TasksTab({ tasks }: { tasks: TaskSummary[] }) {
-  if (tasks.length === 0) {
+type MergedItem = { kind: 'task'; data: TaskSummary } | { kind: 'history'; data: HistoryItem };
+
+function getItemTime(item: MergedItem): number {
+  if (item.kind === 'task') return item.data.startedAt;
+  // 从 folderName 提取时间戳: "task-YYMMDDHHmmSS-N"
+  const m = item.data.folderName.match(/^task-(\d{12})/);
+  if (m) {
+    const digits = m[1];
+    const y = 2000 + parseInt(digits.slice(0, 2), 10);
+    const mo = parseInt(digits.slice(2, 4), 10) - 1;
+    const d = parseInt(digits.slice(4, 6), 10);
+    const h = parseInt(digits.slice(6, 8), 10);
+    const mi = parseInt(digits.slice(8, 10), 10);
+    const s = parseInt(digits.slice(10, 12), 10);
+    return new Date(y, mo, d, h, mi, s).getTime();
+  }
+  return 0;
+}
+
+function TasksTab({ tasks, history }: { tasks: TaskSummary[]; history: HistoryItem[] }) {
+  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set(tasks.map(t => t.taskId)));
+
+  const toggleExpand = (key: string) => {
+    setExpanded(prev => {
+      const next = new Set(prev);
+      if (next.has(key)) next.delete(key); else next.add(key);
+      return next;
+    });
+  };
+
+  // 合并为倒序列表
+  const merged: MergedItem[] = [
+    ...tasks.map(t => ({ kind: 'task' as const, data: t })),
+    ...history.map(h => ({ kind: 'history' as const, data: h })),
+  ].sort((a, b) => getItemTime(b) - getItemTime(a));
+
+  if (merged.length === 0) {
     return <div className="placeholder-text">暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中点击「生成」开始。</div>;

> 
> Wait, I also need to make sure the init message in App component properly handles the initial history state. Looking at my code, the init message doesn't include history or history in its type. But the webview initializes history as []. Then the subsequent taskStateUpdate (sent after init) will update it.
> 
> Actually, looking at the init flow in extension.ts:
> ```typescript
> sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'init', config, activeMdPath, tasks: summaries, autoLibs, manualLibs });
> sidebarProvider.postMessage({ type: 'taskStateUpdate', tasks: summaries, history });
> ```
> 
> So init comes first, then immediately taskStateUpdate which sets history. The webview will briefly show no history items but then immediately update. This is acceptable.
> 
> Let me commit.
</details>

> 
> ## M7 体验打磨 — 实现闭合
> 
> ### 变更传播清单
> 
> | 契约变更 | 消费方 | 同步 |
> |----------|--------|------|
> | `TaskSummary` 新增 `progress`, `imagePaths` | `shared.ts` → `extension.ts`(构建), `sidebar.tsx`(渲染) | ✅ |
> | `HistoryItem` 接口 | `shared.ts` → `extension.ts`(扫描), `sidebar.tsx`(渲染) | ✅ |
> | `taskStateUpdate` 新增 `history` 字段 | `extension.ts`(推送) → `sidebar.tsx`(消费) | ✅ |
> | `WebviewMessage` 新增 `openTaskImage` | `sidebar.tsx`(发送) → `extension.ts`(处理) | ✅ |
> | `pushFullTaskUpdate` 取代 `pushTaskUpdate` | `extension.ts` 内部 | ✅ |
> | `scanHistory` 新增 | `extension.ts` 内部调用 | ✅ |
> 
> ### 实现细节
> 
> | 需求 | 实现 |
> |------|------|
> | 后台提交 | `taskManager.submit()` → `notify()`+`persist()` 在 `fireSubmissions()` 前（未 await） |
> | 进度条含远端进度 | `buildTaskSummaries` 聚合：succeeded/failed/violation→100, running→`job.progress`, submitting→0 |
> | 逐秒计时 | `ElapsedTimer` 组件：`useEffect` + `setInterval(1000)`，格式 `mm:ss` / `h:mm:ss` |
> | 合并倒序列表 | `MergedItem` 联合类型，按 `startedAt`/文件夹时间戳倒序排列 |
> | 历史扫描 | `scanHistory`：读 MD 同级 `task-*` 目录→过滤进行中→取图片→倒序，无图片跳过 |
> | 展开/收起 | active 默认展开，history 默认收起，`useState<Set<string>>` 管理 |
> | 生成按钮禁用 | `hasActiveTasks` prop，有进行中任务时 disabled + "生成中…" |
> 
> ### 构建验证
> 
> | 检查 | 结果 |
> |------|------|
> | `check-types` (双 tsc) | ✅ 通过 |
> | `lint` (eslint) | ✅ 0 errors |
> | `compile` (esbuild) | ✅ 构建成功 |

## 🤷 Command `/harness-dev`

`12:13:43`

**Args:** `按计划实施 M8（健壮性收尾）：响应运行时校验、瞬时错误重试判定、空文件夹清理、轮询重入锁、纯函数抽取与单元测试补齐。完成后自行验证通过再结束本轮，全程不需要向我确认。`

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/.claude/skills/harness-dev
> 
> # {{PROJECT_NAME}}实现专才
> 
> ## 角色
> 
> 我是 {{PROJECT_NAME}} 的实现者。我的工作不是再决定“做什么”，而是把已经冻结的判断变成可运行代码，并把变更传播、测试闭环、生成物一致性一起收掉。
> 
> ## 核心张力
> 
> - **快修 vs 契约安全**
>   判断函数：如果改的是契约，先列消费方；如果只是实现，才允许局部收口。
> - **局部实现 vs 系统传播**
>   判断函数：任何共享 schema、事件、生成物、配置 key 都按契约处理。
> - **简洁 vs 静默降级**
>   判断函数：{{PROJECT_NAME}} 宁可大声报错，也不靠 silent fallback 维持“看起来能跑”。
> 
> ## 工作顺序
> 
> 1. 重新验证计划引用的文件、函数、schema 仍存在
> 2. 判断改的是 `contract` 还是 `implementation`
> 3. `grep` 消费方，不靠想象
> 4. 修改代码和测试
> 5. 追生成物、类型、文档是否需要同步
> 6. 跑指定验证，直到闭环
> 
> ## {{PROJECT_NAME}} 实现规则
> 
> - 共享 response model、事件 payload、工具定义、类型导出都是契约
> - generated artifact 变了，消费方也必须跟
> - 配置 key、环境变量、路由路径不是“内部细节”
> - 用户可见入口地址是产品契约：正式公网入口只允许 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` / `<NETWORK_REDACTED>`，不要把原始 IP 重新写回 README、默认值、前端 fallback 或分享链接
> - demo / admin 发布必须区分 `prod` 和 `preview`：构建基址、verify URL、远端目录都要跟 channel 对齐，不能混发
> - 改公网 edge 路由时，先改 `ops/nginx/*.conf`，再走 `bash scripts/deploy-edge.sh --yes`，不要只在线上手改 nginx
> - 不把必须参数做成 Optional 兜底
> - 不用 prompt 替代代码保障
> - **Runtime Fix ≠ Closure** — 症状消失不等于修好了。修了 bug 必须分析复发路径、确定防护机制（guard/test/type/convention）、关闭 `prevention_status`。只有 Level 2（复发路径关闭）才算 Fixed，Level 1（症状消失）只算 Runtime Fixed
> 
> ## 发布实现补充
> 
> 涉及部署脚本、nginx、demo 构建或公网地址时，默认补做这几件事：
> 
> 1. `grep` 代码 / 文档 / skill / README 中的旧入口，确认不会把 IP 当成用户入口继续传播
> 2. 同步 `prod` / `preview` 两个发布面，避免只修正式不修预发，或者反过来
> 3. 如果改了 demo 构建基址，重建产物并验证 `dist/index.html` 中的 base 路径
> 4. 如果改了公网入口，验证至少一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 和一条 `<NETWORK_REDACTED>` 路径可达
> 
> ## 来自 crystal-learn 的注入

<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/api.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
import * as https from 'https';
import * as http from 'http';
import * as fs from 'fs';

// ── 类型 ────────────────────────────────────────────

export type Model = 'nano-banana-2' | 'nano-banana-pro' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';
export type AspectRatio = '1:1' | '16:9' | '9:16' | '4:3' | '3:4';
export type ImageSize = '1K' | '2K' | '4K';

export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: Model;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio?: AspectRatio;
  imageSize?: ImageSize;
}

export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'violation' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

// ── gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表 ──────────────────

const PIXEL_SIZE_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': '1008x1008', '2K': '1440x1440', '4K': '2000x2000' },
  '3:4':  { '1K': '864x1152',  '2K': '1216x1632', '4K': '1728x2304' },
  '4:3':  { '1K': '1152x864',  '2K': '1632x1216', '4K': '2304x1728' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1360x768',  '2K': '1888x1056', '4K': '2672x1504' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '768x1360',  '2K': '1056x1888', '4K': '1504x2672' },
};

function toPixelSize(aspectRatio: AspectRatio, imageSize: ImageSize): string {
  const size = PIXEL_SIZE_TABLE[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize];
  if (!size) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的像素换算：${aspectRatio} + ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return size;
}

// ── 请求体构造 ────────────────────────────────────

export function buildRequestBody(req: GenerateRequest, replyType: 'json' | 'async' = 'json'): Record<string, unknown> {
  const { model, prompt, images, aspectRatio = '3:4', imageSize = '1K' } = req;
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = { model, prompt, images, replyType };

  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) {
    body.aspectRatio = aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = imageSize;
  } else if (model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    body.aspectRatio = aspectRatio;
  } else if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    body.aspectRatio = toPixelSize(aspectRatio, imageSize);
  }

  return body;
}

// ── HTTP 请求工具 ─────────────────────────────────

function httpRequest(
  url: string,
  options: { method: string; headers: Record<string, string>; body?: string; timeout?: number }
): Promise<{ statusCode: number; data: string }> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const urlObj = new URL(url);
    const mod = urlObj.protocol === 'https:' ? https : http;
    const req = mod.request(
      url,
      { method: options.method, headers: options.headers, timeout: options.timeout || 30000 },
      (res) => {
        let data = '';
        res.on('data', (chunk: string) => (data += chunk));
        res.on('end', () => resolve({ statusCode: res.statusCode || 0, data }));
      }
    );
    req.on('error', reject);
    req.on('timeout', () => {
      req.destroy();
      reject(new Error('请求超时'));
    });
    if (options.body) {
      req.write(options.body);
    }
    req.end();
  });
}

// ── 运行时校验 ────────────────────────────────────

function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：非 JSON 对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;
  if (typeof d.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：缺少 id');
  }
  const validStatuses = ['running', 'violation', 'succeeded', 'failed'];
  if (typeof d.status !== 'string' || !validStatuses.includes(d.status)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：无效 status "${d.status}"`);
  }
  return d as unknown as GenerateResponse;
}

// ── 瞬时错误判定 ──────────────────────────────────

export function isTransientError(statusCode: number): boolean {
  return statusCode >= 500 || statusCode === 429 || statusCode === 0;
}

// ── public API ────────────────────────────────────

/** 提交生成请求。replyType 默认 'json'（同步），M3 起使用 'async' */
export async function submitGenerate(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  req: GenerateRequest,
  replyType: 'json' | 'async' = 'json',
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const body = buildRequestBody(req, replyType);
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;

  const { statusCode, data } = await httpRequest(url, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  });

  if (statusCode >= 400) {
    if (isTransientError(statusCode)) {
      throw new Error(`服务器瞬时错误（HTTP ${statusCode}），请稍后重试`);
    }
    let errMsg = `请求失败（HTTP ${statusCode}）`;
    try {
      const errBody = JSON.parse(data);
      if (errBody.error) {
        errMsg += `: ${typeof errBody.error === 'string' ? errBody.error : errBody.error.message || JSON.stringify(errBody.error)}`;
      }
    } catch {
      errMsg += `: ${data.slice(0, 200)}`;
    }
    throw new Error(errMsg);
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
  const response = validateGenerateResponse(parsed);

  if (response.status === 'violation') {
    throw new Error(`内容违规：${response.error || '请求被拒绝'}`);
  }
  if (response.status === 'failed') {
    throw new Error(`生成失败：${response.error || '未知错误'}`);
  }

  return response;
}

/** 查询异步任务结果（M3 用） */
export async function pollResult(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;

  const { statusCode, data } = await httpRequest(url, {
    method: 'GET',
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
    timeout: 30000,
  });

  if (isTransientError(statusCode)) {
    throw new Error(`瞬时错误（HTTP ${statusCode}）`);
  }

  const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
  return validateGenerateResponse(parsed);
}

// ── 下载工具 ──────────────────────────────────────

/** 下载单张图片到本地路径，瞬时错误抛异常供调用方重试 */
export function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const file = fs.createWriteStream(destPath);
    const protocol = url.startsWith('https') ? https : http;
    const req = protocol.get(
      url,
      { timeout: 30000 },
      (res) => {
        if (!res.statusCode) {
          file.close();
          fs.unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error('下载失败：无状态码'));
          return;
        }
        if (isTransientError(res.statusCode)) {
          file.close();
          fs.unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error(`瞬时错误（HTTP ${res.statusCode}）`));
          return;
        }
        if (res.statusCode >= 400) {
          file.close();
          fs.unlinkSync(destPath);
          reject(new Error(`下载失败（HTTP ${res.statusCode}）`));
          return;
        }
        res.pipe(file);
        file.on('finish', () => {
          file.close();
          resolve();
        });
      }
    );
    req.on('error', (err) => {
      file.close();
      try { fs.unlinkSync(destPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      reject(err);
    });
    req.on('timeout', () => {
      req.destroy();
      file.close();
      try { fs.unlinkSync(destPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      reject(new Error('下载超时'));
    });
  });
}

/** 根据扩展名推断 MIME 类型 */
export function getMimeType(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml',
  };
  return mimeMap[ext.toLowerCase()] || 'image/png';
}

```

#### 👀 Read `taskManager.ts`

`12:15:13`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/taskManager.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownImages } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, downloadImage, Model, AspectRatio, ImageSize } from './api';
import { ConfigManager, assembleFinalPrompt } from './config';
import { TaskData, JobData } from './shared';

// ── 工具 ──────────────────────────────────────────

function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const yy = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const MM = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const dd = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const HH = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const SS = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${yy}${MM}${dd}${HH}${mm}${SS}`;
}

function findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seq}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  return dirPath;
}

import { IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST } from './assetLibrary';

function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(pathname).slice(1).toLowerCase();
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

let taskIdCounter = 0;

function nextTaskId(): string {
  taskIdCounter++;
  return `task-${Date.now()}-${taskIdCounter}`;
}

// ── TaskManager ───────────────────────────────────

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: TaskData[] = [];
  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false;
  private readonly STORE_KEY = 'imageflow.tasks';
  private readonly POLL_MS = 4000;
  private readonly TIMEOUT_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000;
  private disposed = false;

  constructor(
    private configManager: ConfigManager,
    private globalState: vscode.Memento,
    private onTaskUpdate: (tasks: TaskData[]) => void,
    private onTaskComplete: (task: TaskData, hasImages: boolean, errors: string[]) => void,
  ) {}

  // ── 提交新任务 ────────────────────────────────

  async submit(mdUri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
    const config = await this.configManager.getAll();
    if (!config.apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置中配置 API Key');
      return;
    }

    const fsPath = mdUri.fsPath;
    const mdDir = path.dirname(fsPath);
    const mdContent = fs.readFileSync(fsPath, 'utf-8');

    let parseResult;
    try {
      parseResult = parseMarkdownImages(mdContent, mdDir);
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
      return;
    }

    // 建文件夹
    const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
    const taskDir = findAvailableTaskDir(mdDir, ts);
    fs.mkdirSync(taskDir, { recursive: true });

    // 建 N 个 submitting job
    const N = config.concurrency;
    const now = Date.now();
    const jobs: JobData[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      jobs.push({ jobIndex: i, status: 'submitting', progress: 0, downloadedImages: [] });
    }

    const task: TaskData = {
      taskId: nextTaskId(),
      folderName: path.basename(taskDir),
      taskDir,
      mdPath: fsPath,
      model: config.model,
      jobs,
      startedAt: now,
      sessionStartedAt: now,
    };

    this.tasks.push(task);

    // 立即建卡返回（不等网络）
    this.notify();
    this.persist();

    // 组装最终提示词（注入句 + IMAGES.md + 正文）
    const wsRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;
    const finalPrompt = assembleFinalPrompt(parseResult.promptText, config.model, config.modelInjections, wsRoot);

    // 后台并发提交
    this.fireSubmissions(task, finalPrompt, parseResult.images, config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, config.aspectRatio, config.imageSize, config.model);
  }

  private async fireSubmissions(
    task: TaskData,
    promptText: string,
    images: string[],
    baseUrl: string,
    apiKey: string,
    aspectRatio: string,
    imageSize: string,
    model: string,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const errors: string[] = [];

    const submitOne = async (job: JobData) => {
      try {
        const response = await submitGenerate(baseUrl, apiKey, {
          model: model as Model,
          prompt: promptText,
          images,
          aspectRatio: aspectRatio as AspectRatio,
          imageSize: imageSize as ImageSize,
        }, 'async');
        job.jobId = response.id;
        job.status = 'running';
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.error = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
        errors.push(job.error);
      }
      this.notify();
      this.persist();
    };

    // 并发提交
    await Promise.all(task.jobs.map(submitOne));

    // 全部失败 → 移除任务
    if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'running')) {
      this.removeTask(task);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(task.taskDir); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
      const unique = [...new Set(errors)];
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成提交失败：${unique.join('；')}`);
      return;
    }

    // 有 running 则确保定时器运转
    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  // ── 轮询 ──────────────────────────────────────

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.timer || this.disposed) return;
    this.timer = setInterval(() => { this.tick(); }, this.POLL_MS);
  }

  private stopTimerIfIdle(): void {
    const hasRunning = this.tasks.some(t => t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'));
    if (!hasRunning && this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }

  private async tick(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.polling) return;
    this.polling = true;
    try {
      const config = await this.configManager.getAll();
      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        if (this.disposed) return;
        await this.pollTask(task, config);
      }
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
    this.stopTimerIfIdle();
  }

  private async pollTask(task: TaskData, config: { baseUrl: string; apiKey: string }): Promise<void> {
    // 超时检查（本次会话起算）
    const elapsed = Date.now() - task.sessionStartedAt;
    if (elapsed > this.TIMEOUT_MS) {
      for (const j of task.jobs) {
        if (j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting') {
          j.status = 'failed';
          j.error = '任务超时（10 分钟）';
        }
      }
      this.finalizeTask(task);
      return;
    }

    let changed = false;
    const runningJobs = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running' && j.jobId);

    for (const job of runningJobs) {
      try {
        const result = await pollResult(config.baseUrl, config.apiKey, job.jobId!);
        job.progress = result.progress || 0;

        if (result.status === 'succeeded') {
          job.status = 'succeeded';
          changed = true;
          // 下载结果图
          if (result.results) {
            for (const r of result.results) {
              const imageNum = task.jobs.reduce((sum, j) => sum + j.downloadedImages.length, 0) + 1;
              const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
              const mdBasename = path.basename(task.mdPath, '.md');
              const destPath = path.join(task.taskDir, `${mdBasename}-${imageNum}.${ext}`);
              await downloadImage(r.url, destPath);
              job.downloadedImages.push(destPath);
            }
          }
        } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
          job.status = result.status;
          job.error = result.error || (result.status === 'violation' ? '内容违规' : '生成失败');
          changed = true;
        }
      } catch (err: unknown) {
        const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
        // 瞬时错误保持 running
        if (!isTransientHttpMsg(msg)) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = msg;
          changed = true;
        }
      }

      if (changed) {
        this.notify();
        this.persist();
      }
    }

    // 检查任务是否全部终结
    if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'running' && j.status !== 'submitting' )) {
      this.finalizeTask(task);
    }
  }

  // ── 任务终结 ──────────────────────────────────

  private finalizeTask(task: TaskData): void {
    const hasImages = task.jobs.some(j => j.downloadedImages.length > 0);
    const errors = task.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!);

    this.onTaskComplete(task, hasImages, errors);
    this.removeTask(task);
    this.notify();
    this.persist();
  }

  private removeTask(task: TaskData): void {
    const idx = this.tasks.indexOf(task);
    if (idx >= 0) this.tasks.splice(idx, 1);
  }

  // ── 持久化 ────────────────────────────────────

  private persist(): void {
    const serializable = this.tasks.map(t => ({ ...t }));
    this.globalState.update(this.STORE_KEY, serializable).then(
      undefined,
      () => { /* 忽略持久化错误 */ },
    );
  }

  // ── 重启续拉 ─────────────────────────────────

  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored = this.globalState.get<TaskData[]>(this.STORE_KEY) || [];
    const now = Date.now();

    for (const task of stored) {
      // submitting 态无 jobId → 直接判失败
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting' && !job.jobId) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '提交未完成';
        }
      }
      // 超时按本次会话重置
      task.sessionStartedAt = now;

      // 全部终结的 task 做最终清理
      if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status !== 'running' && j.status !== 'submitting')) {
        const hasImages = task.jobs.some(j => j.downloadedImages.length > 0);
        const errors = task.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map(j => j.error!);
        this.onTaskComplete(task, hasImages, errors);
        // 不加入 this.tasks——直接丢弃
        continue;
      }

      this.tasks.push(task);
    }

    this.persist();
    this.notify();

    // 有 running job → 立即拉一次并恢复定时器
    if (this.tasks.some(t => t.jobs.some(j => j.status === 'running'))) {
      this.ensureTimer();
      this.tick();
    }
  }

  // ── 状态推送 ──────────────────────────────────

  private notify(): void {
    this.onTaskUpdate(this.tasks);
  }

  /** 获取当前任务列表（供 init 消息用） */
  getTasks(): TaskData[] {
    return this.tasks;
  }

  dispose(): void {
    this.disposed = true;
    if (this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }
}

// ── 辅助 ──────────────────────────────────────────

function isTransientHttpMsg(msg: string): boolean {
  return msg.includes('瞬时错误') || msg.includes('请求超时');
}

```
</details>

>   const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
>   if (!isTransientHttpMsg(msg)) {
>     job.status = 'failed';
>     job.error = msg;
>     changed = true;
>   }
> }
> ```
> 
> But `isTransientHttpMsg` only checks for "瞬时错误" or "请求超时". If the API returns a non-JSON response or malformed JSON, `JSON.parse` would throw with a different message. And `validateGenerateResponse` would throw with messages like "响应格式异常：非 JSON 对象" etc. These are NOT transient errors.
> 
> Actually wait - in `pollResult`, the flow is:
> 1. httpRequest → could throw "请求超时" (transient)
> 2. If statusCode is transient (isTransientError): throw "瞬时错误（HTTP XXX）" (transient)
> 3. JSON.parse: could throw SyntaxError (NOT transient, but this is a data format error)
> 4. validateGenerateResponse: throws format errors (NOT transient)
> 
> So in the pollTask error handler, the `isTransientHttpMsg` check correctly catches:
> - "请求超时" → transient
> - "瞬时错误（HTTP XXX）" → transient
> - Everything else (parse errors, validation errors) → NOT transient → marks as failed
> 
> This seems correct.
> 
> Let me look at what I need to do:
> 
> 1. Set up test infrastructure (install mocha, @types/mocha, create .vscode-test.mjs or similar config)
> 2. Create unit tests for pure functions
> 
> The PLAN mentions:
> - parser.test.ts: Image syntax parsing
> - taskManager.test.ts: Aggregated progress calculation  
> - api.test.ts: Transient error determination, gpt-image-2-vip pixel conversion
> - preview.test.ts: Preview text assembly
> 
> Let me check what the spec says about M8 and the PLAN for more details.
> 
> Let me read the plan and spec to understand the full M8 requirements.
</details>

#### 👀 Read `PLAN-image-flow-m1-m8.md`

`12:15:28`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/docs/decisions/PLAN-image-flow-m1-m8.md</code></summary>

````markdown
# PLAN: image-flow M1~M8 实施计划

> 对应 ADR: [ADR-001](./ADR-001-image-flow-architecture.md)
> 需求文档: `agent-eval-spec.md` §13
> API 文档: `docs/grsai-api.md`
> 版本: v0-draft（未冻结）

## 架构覆盖矩阵

ADR 的九项决策全部在 PLAN 中得到承载：

| ADR 决策 | 承载 WP | 验证方式 |
|----------|---------|----------|
| D1 模块拆分 | M1 建文件骨架，后续阶段各填各模块 | `ls src/*.ts` 文件存在 |
| D2 前后端通信 | M2 shared.ts + sidebarProvider.ts | postMessage 收发通 |
| D3 构建体系 | M1 package.json + esbuild + tsconfig + launch.json | F5 启动无报错 |
| D4 配置分层存储 | M2 config.ts | secrets/globalState/workspaceState 读写通 |
| D5 API 层设计 | M1 api.ts，M6 补注入 | 调 API 拿到结果图 |
| D6 任务生命周期 | M3 taskManager.ts | 异步提交→轮询→下载→持久化 |
| D7 素材库双段模型 | M4 assetLibrary.ts | 左键开图 + 右键插入引用 |
| D8 预览与生成共用 | M5 preview.ts | 预览文档四段完整 |
| D9 分阶段交付 | 本 PLAN 的 M1→M8 顺序 | 每阶段结束后独立可验证 |

---

## M1: 脚手架 + 端到端生成

**目标**：扩展骨架可 F5 启动，右键 Markdown 能触发生成、下载图片到本地。

**范围**：
- 项目骨架：`package.json`（含所有 contributes 项、scripts、dependencies）、`tsconfig.json`（主进程）、`tsconfig.webview.json`（webview DOM/React 类型）、`esbuild.config.mjs`、`eslint.config.mjs`、`.vscode/launch.json`
- 入口 `src/extension.ts`：`activate()` 注册两条命令 + 右键菜单（`when: resourceExtname == .md`），`deactivate()` 依赖 context.subscriptions 释放
- `src/parser.ts`：Markdown 图片语法解析（含 `<>` 包裹路径、空格/括号）、参考图去重编号、相对路径读文件转 base64 data URI、正文图片语法替换为 `[imageN]`
- `src/api.ts`：单函数 `submitGenerate(model, prompt, images, aspectRatio, imageSize)` →
  按模型系列分派尺寸字段 → `POST /v1/api/generate`（先同步 `replyType: json`）→
  下载结果图到 task 文件夹
- 任务文件夹 `task-<yyMMddHHmmSS>-<seq>` 在同级目录创建，seq 防同秒覆盖
- 生成失败时错误通知，空内容时提示「内容为空」

**此阶段已知缺项**（留给后续 M3 补）：
- 无异步轮询（`replyType: json` 同步等返回）
- 无侧栏 UI（仅命令 + 通知）
- 无任务持久化

**文件清单**：
```
新建: package.json, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.webview.json,
      esbuild.config.mjs, eslint.config.mjs, .vscode/launch.json,
      src/extension.ts, src/parser.ts, src/api.ts
```

**验证**：F5 启动 → 右键 .md → 选「生成 AI 图片」→ task 文件夹出现 + 图片下载成功。

---

## M2: 侧栏化与配置系统

**目标**：侧栏 Webview 可操作，配置即时保存，三标签页可切换。

**范围**：
- `src/shared.ts`：postMessage 消息类型集中定义（`InitMessage` / `ConfigUpdate` / `GenerateRequest` / `TaskState` 等）
- `src/sidebarProvider.ts`：实现 `WebviewViewProvider`，生成 HTML（CSP 含 nonce + `webview.cspSource`），`localResourceRoots` 覆盖 media + 工作区 + 素材库目录，消息路由（onDidReceiveMessage）
- `src/config.ts`：`getConfig()`/`setConfig()` → `apiKey` 走 secrets，其余走 globalState（patch 语义），素材库列表走 workspaceState
- `media/sidebar.tsx`：React 19 + Radix UI 三标签页壳子（工作台/任务/设置各一个占位区域），前端挂载后发 `init`，收到配置后渲染
- `media/sidebar.css`：基础布局样式
- 扩展激活时 `activate()` 注册侧栏视图 + 命令
- 设置页：API Key 输入框 + 链接 + 节点下拉 + 步进器（此时功能占位，实际生效在后续阶段）

**文件清单**：
```
新建: src/shared.ts, src/config.ts, src/sidebarProvider.ts,
      media/sidebar.tsx, media/sidebar.css
修改: src/extension.ts (注册侧栏视图), package.json (确认 contributes.views)
```

**验证**：F5 → 侧栏出现「AI 绘图」→ 三标签可切换 → 设置页改配置即时保存 → 重启后配置仍在。

---

## M3: 异步任务机制

**目标**：改成异步提交+轮询，任务持久化，重启续拉，多任务并发。

**范围**：
- `src/taskManager.ts`：
  - 任务数据结构：`Task { folderName, model, jobs: Job[], startedAt, state }`
  - `submitTask(mdPath, prompt, images)` → 本地建卡（N 个 `submitting` job）→ 入列 → 并发发出 N 个 `POST replyType:async` → 拿到 job id 转 `running` → 持久化
  - 全部 N 个提交失败：移除任务、删空文件夹、聚合错误通知
  - 单定时器 4s 轮询（仅当存在 running job 时运转，无则停）
  - 重入锁：一轮未结束不得开启下一轮
  - 下载：`succeeded` job 的 results url 列表下载到任务文件夹，文件名接续编号，扩展名白名单校验
  - 超时 10min 兜底：仍 running 的 job 标记失败
  - 终结后：从持久化列表移除；有失败→通知（有成图→警告 / 无成图→错误+删空文件夹）
  - `resume()`：激活时读 globalState 恢复未完成任务，立即拉一次+恢复定时器；`submitting` 态无 id 的判失败
  - 超时按「本次会话起算」重置
  - 持久化：状态变更即时写 globalState
- `src/api.ts` 扩展：
  - `pollResult(id)`：`GET /v1/api/result?id=`
  - 运行时校验：status 枚举、id/results/error 形状
  - 瞬时错误判定：5xx/429/网络失败 → 保持 running；格式异常/写盘失败→判失败
  - 30s 超时 abort

**文件清单**：
```
新建: src/taskManager.ts
修改: src/api.ts (加 pollResult + 运行时校验), src/extension.ts (注册 resume + 定时器生命周期)
```

**验证**：提交生成 → 本地卡立即出现 → 4s 后开始轮询 → 图片逐张出现 → 关闭再开扩展 → 未完成任务继续 → 全部完成后从列表消失。

---

## M4: 素材库

**目标**：工作台素材库可浏览，右键插入相对引用。

**范围**：
- `src/assetLibrary.ts`：
  - 自动素材库：生效 MD → 从工作区根下一层起每层取直接图片 → 图片按路径分组为库（无图片层跳过）
  - 手动素材库：系统文件夹选择器 → 递归扫描（深度≤3、条目≤500）→ 去重 → 存 workspaceState
  - 缩略图读取：本地图片经 `asWebviewUri` 转换
  - 右键插入引用 `![alt](path)`：
    - 仅当活动编辑器是生效 MD 时才插入，否则警告
    - 路径 POSIX 风格，非 `..` 开头加 `./`
    - 含空格/括号用 `<>` 包裹
    - 跨盘符无法相对引用时警告放弃
    - alt 取文件名去扩展名
- 图片类型白名单：png/jpg/jpeg/gif/webp/bmp/svg，供扫描、下载扩展名校验、mime 推断共用
- `media/sidebar.tsx` 扩展：工作台页渲染素材库区 + 缩略图网格（`workbenchCols` 控制列数）+ 右键菜单

**文件清单**：
```
新建: src/assetLibrary.ts
修改: src/sidebarProvider.ts (asWebviewUri + localResourceRoots 更新),
      media/sidebar.tsx (素材库 UI + 右键菜单),
      src/shared.ts (素材库消息类型)
```

**验证**：生效 MD 时自动库显示 → 手动添加文件夹 → 缩略图出现 → 左键打开原图 → 右键插入 Markdown 引用到光标处。

---

## M5: 预览请求

**目标**：预览请求与真实生成共用请求体构造，输出四段预览文档。

**范围**：
- `src/preview.ts`：
  - `generatePreview(mdPath, apiConfig)` → 走与真实提交**同一函数**构造请求体
  - 输出临时预览文档（untitled, language: markdown）：
    1. 最终提示词（含注入，单独成段）
    2. 请求地址
    3. 请求参数 JSON（剔除 prompt/images）
    4. 参考图概览（每张 imageN: 前 48 字符...(总长度)）
- 重构 `src/api.ts`：将请求体构造逻辑抽出为 `buildRequestBody(model, prompt, images, aspectRatio, imageSize)`，提交和预览两处调用
- 命令 `image-flow.previewRequest` 绑定到 `src/extension.ts`

**文件清单**：
```
新建: src/preview.ts
修改: src/api.ts (抽出 buildRequestBody), src/extension.ts (绑定 preview 命令)
```

**验证**：右键 .md → 预览请求 → 临时文档打开 → 四段完整 → 提示词与真实提交一致。

---

## M6: 提示词注入

**目标**：模型注入句 + IMAGES.md 注入在提交和预览两端生效，首次激活种种子不覆盖用户修改。

**范围**：
- `src/config.ts` 扩展：
  - `modelInjections` 配置读写（`Record<string, string>`）
  - 首次激活种入逻辑：遍历内置种子，只补配置中尚不存在的模型键（用户改过/清空的不覆盖）
  - 激活时**先种入再注册侧栏**，保证侧栏首次读到默认句
  - 内置种子：`gpt-image-2`、`gpt-image-2-vip` 预置「整体画面弱化微小细节，避免过度刻画。」
- 提示词组装函数（共用）：
  - `assembleFinalPrompt(mdContent, model, workspaceRoot)` →
    `模型注入句` + `IMAGES.md 全文` + `替换后正文`，空行连接，空段省略
  - IMAGES.md 不存在/为空/无工作区 → 静默跳过
- 提交（M3 taskManager）和预览（M5 preview）两处调用同一组装函数
- 设置页：模型注入句编辑器（模型下拉 + 多行文本框）

**文件清单**：
```
修改: src/config.ts (modelInjections + 种入逻辑),
      src/taskManager.ts (调 assembleFinalPrompt),
      src/preview.ts (调 assembleFinalPrompt),
      media/sidebar.tsx (设置页注入编辑),
      src/extension.ts (activate 种入顺序)
```

**验证**：配 gpt-image-2 → 生成 → 最终 prompt 含注入句 → 预览请求同样含 → 设置页改注入句 → 新句生效 → 重置/首次激活 → 默认句出现且未覆盖已改项。

---

## M7: 体验打磨

**目标**：后台提交、进度条、逐秒计时、生效 MD 跟随、任务/历史合并列表。

**范围**：
- `src/taskManager.ts` 修改：
  - 提交期间「生成」按钮禁用 + 显示「生成中…」
  - 提交成功后侧栏自动切到「任务」标签页
- `media/sidebar.tsx` 扩展：
  - 进度条聚合：每个 job 占 1/N，终结=100, running=远端 progress, submitting=0，取整均摊
  - 已进行时长每秒自增（`mm:ss`/`h:mm:ss`），基于真实提交时间
  - 进行中卡片展开/折叠，标题含 `文件夹名(模型)·提交中 x/N` 或 `生成中 done/N·[失败 n·]时长`
  - 实时显示「正在提交 n 个请求…」「还有 n 张正在生成…」+ 错误列表
  - 历史与进行中合并为一条倒序列表：历史 = 扫描 `task-*` 文件夹排除进行中任务，无图不列；完成瞬间先并入历史再移除进行中卡片（防闪烁）
  - 缩略图点击用 VS Code 打开原图，每行张数由 `tasksCols` 控制
- `src/extension.ts` 修改：
  - 生效 MD 跟随活动编辑器：切到 `.md` 即生效，切到非 MD 标签页时**保留上一个不清空**
  - 生效 MD 变化时刷新历史与自动素材库；未变化不重扫
  - 右键菜单触发生成时目标 MD 同时成为生效 MD + 聚焦侧栏
- 生成行控件：模型/分辨率/比例下拉 + 并发数步进器（1~10）
- 状态行显示最近状态/错误（错误红色），「未打开 Markdown 文件」占位

**文件清单**：
```
修改: src/taskManager.ts (后台提交流程),
      media/sidebar.tsx (进度条/计时/列表/控件/状态行),
      src/extension.ts (生效 MD 跟随逻辑),
      src/shared.ts (新增消息类型如 activeEditorChanged)
```

**验证**：点生成 → 按钮禁用 → 卡片立即出现 → 进度条跳动 → 计时逐秒走 → 切到其他 .md → 历史刷新 → 切非 MD → 侧栏保留上次。

---

## M8: 健壮性收尾

**目标**：运行时校验、瞬时错误重试、空文件夹清理、重入锁已有、单元测试补齐。

**范围**：
- `src/api.ts` 加固：响应运行时校验（status 枚举/id/results/error 形状），不用裸断言
- `src/taskManager.ts` 加固：轮询重入锁已在 M3 实现，本阶段复核；瞬时错误重试逻辑复核（5xx/429/网络失败保持 running、格式异常判失败）；空文件夹清理复核
- 单元测试（`src/test/`，mocha + vscode-test）：
  - `parser.test.ts`：图片语法解析与替换（普通路径、尖括号含空格/括号、重复引用去重编号、编号与顺序一致）
  - `taskManager.test.ts`：聚合进度计算（全 submitting=0、混合态、全部终结=100）
  - `api.test.ts`：瞬时错误判定（5xx/429/abort/fetch failed 为瞬时；格式错误非瞬时）、gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算
  - `preview.test.ts`：预览文本组装（剔除 prompt/images、参考图概览格式）
- 确保 `npm run check-types`（两次 tsc --noEmit）和 `npm run lint` 通过
- 确保 `npm run test` 通过

**文件清单**：
```
新建: src/test/parser.test.ts, src/test/taskManager.test.ts,
      src/test/api.test.ts, src/test/preview.test.ts
修改: src/api.ts (运行时校验加固),
      src/taskManager.ts (边缘情况复核),
      .vscode-test.mjs (测试配置)
```

**验证**：`npm run check-types && npm run lint && npm run test` 全绿 → F5 端到端 golden journey 正常。

---

## WP 概览表

| WP | 阶段 | 核心文件 | 依赖 | 独立验证 |
|----|------|---------|------|---------|
| M1 | 脚手架+端到端 | package.json, extension.ts, parser.ts, api.ts | — | F5 启动 + 右键生成出图 |
| M2 | 侧栏+配置 | shared.ts, config.ts, sidebarProvider.ts, sidebar.tsx | M1 | 侧栏三标签切换 + 配置持久化 |
| M3 | 异步任务 | taskManager.ts, api.ts 扩展 | M2 | 异步轮询 + 重启续拉 |
| M4 | 素材库 | assetLibrary.ts, sidebar.tsx 扩展 | M2 | 缩略图浏览 + 右键插入 |
| M5 | 预览请求 | preview.ts, api.ts 重构 | M1 | 预览文档四段完整 |
| M6 | 提示词注入 | config.ts 扩展, taskManager/preview 共用 | M3+M5 | 注入在提交和预览两端生效 |
| M7 | 体验打磨 | taskManager.ts 修改, sidebar.tsx 扩展, extension.ts 修改 | M3+M4 | 进度条+计时+MD 跟随+合并列表 |
| M8 | 健壮性收尾 | test/*.ts, api.ts/taskManager.ts 加固 | M1~M7 | 四检全绿 + 端到端 golden journey |

## 跨 WP 接缝

| 接缝 | 涉及 WP | seam_owner | 契约 |
|------|---------|------------|------|
| postMessage 协议 | M2, M3, M4, M7 | M2 (shared.ts) | 消息类型在 shared.ts 集中定义，后续 WP 只能追加 |
| API 请求体构造 | M1, M5, M6 | M1 (api.ts buildRequestBody) | 提取为独立函数，M5/M6 复用 |
| 提示词组装 | M1, M6 | M6 (assembleFinalPrompt) | 提交和预览共用 |
| 任务持久化格式 | M3, M7 | M3 (taskManager.ts) | globalState 中任务 schema 由 M3 定义 |
| asWebviewUri 转换 | M2, M4, M7 | M2 (sidebarProvider.ts) | 本地图片路径统一经 sidebarProvider 转换 |

## golden_journeys

1. **用户首次使用**：安装扩展 → 配 API Key → 打开 .md 写提示词 → 右键生成 → 图片出现在同级文件夹 → 侧栏看到任务进度
2. **重启续拉**：生成中途关 VS Code → 重开 → 自动续拉未完成任务 → 图片继续下载
3. **素材库工作流**：加手动素材库 → 浏览缩略图 → 右键插入引用到 Markdown → 含空格路径正确 `<>` 包裹
4. **预览不消耗额度**：配模型+比例+注入句 → 预览请求 → 四段预览文档 → 确认参数后真实提交
5. **多任务并发**：同时提交两个 .md 生成 → 各建各的 task 文件夹 → 共用定时器轮询 → 互不干扰

````
</details>

#### 👀 Read `parser.ts`

`12:15:28`

### 💭 Thinking: *Now I have a clear picture.*

`12:16:19`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Now I have a clear picture. Let me analyze what M8 actually needs:
>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';

/** 图片类型白名单 — 供素材库扫描、历史扫描、下载扩展名校验与 mime 推断共用 */
export const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set(['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg']);

export function isImageFile(filePath: string): boolean {
  const ext = path.extname(filePath).slice(1).toLowerCase();
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext);
}

// ── 自动素材库 ──────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * 按生效 MD 路径自动生成素材库：从工作区根下一层起，到 MD 目录为止，
 * 每一层各成一个库，只取该层直接图片（不递归）。无图片层跳过。
 */
export function scanAutoLibs(mdPath: string): { name: string; path: string; files: { name: string; path: string }[] }[] {
  const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
  if (!workspaceFolders || workspaceFolders.length === 0) return [];

  const wsRoot = workspaceFolders[0].uri.fsPath;
  const rel = path.relative(wsRoot, mdPath);
  if (rel.startsWith('..') || path.isAbsolute(rel) || rel === '') return [];

  // 从 MD 父目录向上走到工作区根（不含根），收集后翻转得自上而下顺序
  const dirs: string[] = [];
  let current = path.dirname(mdPath);
  while (current !== wsRoot) {
    const parent = path.dirname(current);
    if (parent === current) break; // 到达文件系统根（不应在循环走到这里，但防御）
    dirs.unshift(current);
    current = parent;
  }

  const libs: { name: string; path: string; files: { name: string; path: string }[] }[] = [];
  for (const dir of dirs) {
    const files = scanDirectImages(dir);
    if (files.length > 0) {
      libs.push({ name: path.relative(wsRoot, dir), path: dir, files });
    }
  }
  return libs;
}

function scanDirectImages(dirPath: string): { name: string; path: string }[] {
  if (!fs.existsSync(dirPath)) return [];
  try {
    const entries = fs.readdirSync(dirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
    return entries
      .filter(e => e.isFile() && isImageFile(e.name))
      .map(e => ({ name: e.name, path: path.join(dirPath, e.name) }));
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

// ── 手动素材库 ──────────────────────────────────────

export const MANUAL_LIBS_KEY = 'imageflow.manualLibs';

/** 递归扫描图片，深度 ≤3 层，条目 ≤500（防误加超大目录卡死） */
export function scanManualLib(rootPath: string): { name: string; path: string }[] {
  const result: { name: string; path: string }[] = [];
  scanManualRecursive(rootPath, rootPath, 1, result);
  return result;
}

function scanManualRecursive(rootPath: string, currentPath: string, depth: number, result: { name: string; path: string }[]): void {
  if (depth > 3 || result.length >= 500) return;

  let entries: fs.Dirent[];
  try {
    entries = fs.readdirSync(currentPath, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return; // 权限错误等，跳过
  }

  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (result.length >= 500) break;
    const fullPath = path.join(currentPath, entry.name);

    if (entry.isDirectory() && depth < 3) {
      scanManualRecursive(rootPath, fullPath, depth + 1, result);
    } else if (entry.isFile() && isImageFile(entry.name)) {
      result.push({ name: entry.name, path: fullPath });
    }
  }
}

// ── 插入引用 ────────────────────────────────────────

/** 构建插入 Markdown 的光标处的图片引用文本 */
export function buildInsertText(imagePath: string, mdPath: string): string | { error: string } {
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);

  // 跨盘符检查
  if (path.parse(imagePath).root !== path.parse(mdDir).root) {
    return { error: '图片与 Markdown 在不同盘符，无法生成相对路径引用' };
  }

  let rel = path.relative(mdDir, imagePath);
  rel = rel.split(path.sep).join('/');

  // 非 .. 开头时加 ./ 前缀
  if (!rel.startsWith('..')) {
    rel = './' + rel;
  }

  // 含空格或半角括号时用 <> 包裹
  if (rel.includes(' ') || rel.includes('(') || rel.includes(')')) {
    rel = `<${rel}>`;
  }

  const alt = path.basename(imagePath, path.extname(imagePath));
  return `![${alt}](${rel})`;
}

```
</details>

<details>

```
import * as esbuild from 'esbuild';
import * as fs from 'fs';

const isWatch = process.argv.includes('--watch');

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const extensionConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['src/extension.ts'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'dist/extension.js',
  platform: 'node',
  format: 'cjs',
  external: ['vscode'],
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const webviewConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['media/sidebar.tsx'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'media/sidebar.js',
  platform: 'browser',
  format: 'iife',
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

async function build() {
  /** @type {Promise<esbuild.BuildResult>[]} */
  const builds = [];

  builds.push(esbuild.build(extensionConfig));

  if (fs.existsSync('media/sidebar.tsx')) {
    builds.push(esbuild.build(webviewConfig));
  }

  try {
    await Promise.all(builds);
    console.log('esbuild 构建成功');
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('esbuild 构建失败:', err);
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

async function watch() {
  const ctx = await esbuild.context(extensionConfig);
  await ctx.watch();
  console.log('esbuild watch 已启动...');
}

if (isWatch) {
  watch();
} else {
  build();
}

```
</details>

`12:16:58`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-wow-harness-260612165749/src/prompt.ts</code></summary>

````typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';

/**
 * 按 spec §7.3 组装最终 prompt：模型注入句 + IMAGES.md + 替换后正文，
 * 空行连接，空段省略。提交与预览共用。
 */
export function assembleFinalPrompt(
  parsedPromptText: string,
  model: string,
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>,
  workspaceRoot: string | undefined,
): string {
  const parts: string[] = [];

  // 模型注入句
  const injection = modelInjections[model];
  if (injection) {
    parts.push(injection);
  }

  // 工作区根 IMAGES.md
  if (workspaceRoot) {
    const imagesPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      if (fs.existsSync(imagesPath)) {
        const content = fs.readFileSync(imagesPath, 'utf-8').trim();
        if (content) {
          parts.push(content);
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // 静默跳过（无权限等）
    }
  }

  // 替换后正文
  if (parsedPromptText) {
    parts.push(parsedPromptText);
  }

  return parts.join('\n\n');
}

/** 组装预览文档 Markdown 文本（四段：提示词、地址、参数、参考图） */
export function buildPreviewMarkdown(
  finalPrompt: string,
  baseUrl: string,
  paramsForDisplay: Record<string, unknown>,
  imageSummary: string,
): string {
  return [
    '# 预览请求',
    '',
    '## 最终提示词',
    '',
    '```',
    finalPrompt,
    '```',
    '',
    '## 请求地址',
    '',
    `\`POST ${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate\``,
    '',
    '## 请求参数',
    '',
    '```json',
    JSON.stringify(paramsForDisplay, null, 2),
    '```',
    '',
    '## 参考图概览',
    '',
    imageSummary,
  ].join('\n');
}

````
</details>

@@ -1 +1,14 @@+// ── 聚合进度计算 ──────────────────────────────────
+
+/** 计算任务聚合进度（0-100），各 job 均摊。终结态=100，running=远端进度，submitting=0 */
+export function computeAggregatedProgress(jobs: { status: string; progress: number }[]): number {
+  if (jobs.length === 0) return 0;
+  const total = jobs.reduce((sum, j) => {
+    if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') return sum + 100;
+    if (j.status === 'running') return sum + j.progress;
+    return sum;
+  }, 0);
+  return Math.round(total / jobs.length);
+}

```typescript
import * as assert from 'assert';
import {
  isTransientError,
  toPixelSize,
  buildRequestBody,
  validateGenerateResponse,
  getMimeType,
} from '../api';

describe('api', () => {
  // ── isTransientError ──────────────────────────

  describe('isTransientError', () => {
    it('5xx 为瞬时错误', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(500), true);
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(502), true);
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(503), true);
    });

    it('429 为瞬时错误', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(429), true);
    });

    it('状态码 0（连接断开）为瞬时错误', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(0), true);
    });

    it('4xx（除 429）不是瞬时错误', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(400), false);
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(401), false);
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(403), false);
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(404), false);
    });

    it('2xx 不是瞬时错误', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(isTransientError(200), false);
    });
  });

  // ── toPixelSize ───────────────────────────────

  describe('toPixelSize', () => {
    it('1:1 + 1K → 1008x1008', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(toPixelSize('1:1', '1K'), '1008x1008');
    });

    it('3:4 + 2K → 1216x1632', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(toPixelSize('3:4', '2K'), '1216x1632');
    });

    it('16:9 + 4K → 2672x1504', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(toPixelSize('16:9', '4K'), '2672x1504');
    });

    it('9:16 + 1K → 768x1360', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(toPixelSize('9:16', '1K'), '768x1360');
    });

    it('不支持的组合抛异常', () => {
      assert.throws(
        () => toPixelSize('1:1' as any, '8K' as any),
        /不支持的像素换算/,
      );
    });
  });

  // ── buildRequestBody ──────────────────────────

  describe('buildRequestBody', () => {
    const baseReq = {
      model: 'nano-banana-2' as const,
      prompt: 'test prompt',
      images: [] as string[],
    };

    it('nano-banana 系列含 aspectRatio 与 imageSize', () => {
      const body = buildRequestBody({ ...baseReq, aspectRatio: '1:1', imageSize: '2K' });
      assert.strictEqual(body.aspectRatio, '1:1');
      assert.strictEqual(body.imageSize, '2K');
    });

    it('gpt-image-2 含 aspectRatio 不含 imageSize', () => {
      const body = buildRequestBody({ ...baseReq, model: 'gpt-image-2', aspectRatio: '16:9' });
      assert.strictEqual(body.aspectRatio, '16:9');
      assert.strictEqual(body.imageSize, undefined);
    });

    it('gpt-image-2-vip 将比例与尺寸换算为像素字符串', () => {
      const body = buildRequestBody({
        ...baseReq,
        model: 'gpt-image-2-vip',
        aspectRatio: '1:1',
        imageSize: '1K',
      });
      assert.strictEqual(body.aspectRatio, '1008x1008');
      assert.strictEqual(body.imageSize, undefined);
    });

    it('默认 aspectRatio 为 3:4，默认 imageSize 为 1K', () => {
      const body = buildRequestBody(baseReq);
      assert.strictEqual(body.aspectRatio, '3:4');
      assert.strictEqual(body.imageSize, '1K');
    });

    it('含 replyType 字段', () => {
      const body = buildRequestBody(baseReq, 'async');
      assert.strictEqual(body.replyType, 'async');
    });
  });

  // ── validateGenerateResponse ──────────────────

  describe('validateGenerateResponse', () => {
    it('合法 running 响应通过', () => {
      const resp = validateGenerateResponse({ id: 'abc123', status: 'running' });
      assert.strictEqual(resp.id, 'abc123');
      assert.strictEqual(resp.status, 'running');
    });

    it('合法 succeeded 响应（含 results）通过', () => {
      const resp = validateGenerateResponse({
        id: 'xyz',
        status: 'succeeded',
        results: [{ url: 'https://example.com/img.png' }],
      });
      assert.deepStrictEqual(resp.results, [{ url: 'https://example.com/img.png' }]);
    });

    it('violation 状态通过', () => {
      const resp = validateGenerateResponse({ id: 'v1', status: 'violation', error: '违规' });
      assert.strictEqual(resp.status, 'violation');
    });

    it('非对象抛异常', () => {
      assert.throws(() => validateGenerateResponse(null), /非 JSON 对象/);
      assert.throws(() => validateGenerateResponse('string'), /非 JSON 对象/);
    });

    it('缺少 id 抛异常', () => {
      assert.throws(() => validateGenerateResponse({ status: 'running' }), /缺少 id/);
    });

    it('无效 status 抛异常', () => {
      assert.throws(
        () => validateGenerateResponse({ id: 'x', status: 'pending' }),
        /无效 status/,
      );
    });
  });

  // ── getMimeType ───────────────────────────────

  describe('getMimeType', () => {
    it('已知扩展名返回正确 MIME', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('png'), 'image/png');
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('jpg'), 'image/jpeg');
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('jpeg'), 'image/jpeg');
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('gif'), 'image/gif');
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('webp'), 'image/webp');
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('svg'), 'image/svg+xml');
    });

    it('未知扩展名默认 image/png', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('tiff'), 'image/png');
    });

    it('大小写不敏感', () => {
      assert.strictEqual(getMimeType('PNG'), 'image/png');
    });
  });
});

```
</details>
